name: Kimberley Boggus
subject: Another debate night
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Franken for Iowa
body:
We've got another debate tomorrow night, shipmates! Be sure to tune in at 4PM CT on WHO-TV, KCAU, or WHBF.
|
---
| |
---

| | We've got another debate tomorrow night, shipmates! Be sure to tune in at 4PM CT on WHO-TV, KCAU, or WHBF. Admiral Mike aced the last two debates, and now it's time for him to step on stage once more and continue to share his vision with every Iowa voter. But debates alone won't win the election. Right now, outside groups are trying to use the Admiral's 37-year service against him. **They are targeting Iowa 's Admiral and it's up to us to correct the record: _After 28 moves across America and four continents, we are fortunate to have him home to serve Iowans in the U.S. Senate._** **[_Can you help sponsor the Franken Defense Fund?_](https://act.frankenforiowa.org/page/m/b7f2550/33365068/4a7ecb2a/3f8bc7d4/1303298293/VEsH/?g=DOn8TVNw52hdfH9rXQFzC_A "http://secure.actblue.com/donate/mf_defensefund?refcode=FRA_20200520_em_fr_2nddebate1_all_L1") Within minutes of your donation, well send it to one of our response programs -- online ads, TV ads, or mailers.** _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | [Mail Sponsor: $25 >>](https://act.frankenforiowa.org/page/m/b7f2550/33365068/4a7ecb2a/3f8bc7d5/1303298293/VEsE/?g=DOn8TVNw52hdfH9rXQFzC_A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mf_defensefund?amount=25&express_lane=true&refcode=FRA_20200520_em_fr_2nddebate1_all_abx25")

name: Steve Chabot
subject: A Missed Opportunity
body:
The bill contained so many bad things, that even 14 Democrats voted against it No images? [Click here](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-e-jkpuhil-kujkulhluu-z/) [](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jkpuhil-kujkulhluu-r/) [](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jkpuhil-kujkulhluu-y/)
### [A Missed Opportunity](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jkpuhil-kujkulhluu-j/)
Nancy Pelosi's House of Representatives got together last week to vote on legislation crafted by the Democrats - without input from the Republicans. In this week's blog, I discuss this "messaging" bill, which does nothing to help cope with the coronavirus challenge and has no chance at becoming law. [Read this entry >>](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jkpuhil-kujkulhluu-t/)
# Previous Blog Posts
[](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jkpuhil-kujkulhluu-i/)
### [Reopening America - Safely](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jkpuhil-kujkulhluu-d/)
For about two months now, much of America has been more or less shut down due to the COVID-19 pandemic. In this week's blog, I discuss President Trump's Reopen America Task Force and Ohio's reopening plan, known as the Responsible RestartOhio Plan. There will be challenges, however I think we Americans will prevail! [Read this entry >>](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jkpuhil-kujkulhluu-h/) [](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jkpuhil-kujkulhluu-k/)
### [COVID-19 and Murder Hornets](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jkpuhil-kujkulhluu-u/)
In my blog this week, I discuss how our lives have changed during this time of COVID-19 and to make matters worse, now we have to worry about an insect invasion! [Read this entry >>](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jkpuhil-kujkulhluu-o/) [](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jkpuhil-kujkulhluu-b/)
### [China Must be Held Accountable](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jkpuhil-kujkulhluu-n/)
To date, over 58,000 Americans have lost their lives due to the coronavirus pandemic. In this week's blog, I examine why communist China should be held accountable for the global devastation caused by this virus. [Read this entry >>](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jkpuhil-kujkulhluu-p/) [Donate](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jkpuhil-kujkulhluu-x/) [Get a Yard Sign](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jkpuhil-kujkulhluu-m/) [](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jkpuhil-kujkulhluu-c/) | [](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jkpuhil-kujkulhluu-q/)| [](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jkpuhil-kujkulhluu-a/)| [](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jkpuhil-kujkulhluu-f/)

name: Mike Kelly For Congress
subject: In case you missed it! Mike on The View!
body:
[](http://www.trailblz.info/kellymike/gateway/1.129400.aspx)
Dear Peter,
I hope this email finds you and yours well! In case you missed it, I was honored yesterday morning to be a guest speaker on The View. The topic of conversation was something I have, for better or worse, become very acquanted with. Coronavirus. During the 9 minute segment, one of the interviewers asked me about my decision to take the prescribed hydroxychloroquine. You can watch my response by clicking [here](http://www.trailblz.info/kellymike/gateway/29.129400.aspx)!
This experience has magnified the need for strong leadership and a strong voice in D.C. My greatest honor is providing the leadership and the voice for YOUR views. I am committed to getting our state back to work, while progressing through this pandemic safely and responsibly. Small businesses, families, and everyone's bottom line is relying on us to get America re-opened for business.
As I humbly ask your support in the upcoming election, and while I know times are uncertain, if you approve of what I am doing in Washington, D.C. and can afford to, any small donation helps.

My best,
_Mike_
[](http://www.trailblz.info/kellymike/gateway/7.129400.aspx)
_P.S. _You can like our [Facebook ](http://www.trailblz.info/kellymike/gateway/2.129400.aspx)page [](http://www.trailblz.info/kellymike/gateway/2.129400.aspx) , follow us on [Twitter](http://www.trailblz.info/kellymike/gateway/3.129400.aspx) [](http://www.trailblz.info/kellymike/gateway/3.129400.aspx) , or contribute to my campaign at [www.mikekellyforcongress.com](http://www.trailblz.info/kellymike/gateway/7.129400.aspx). Your contributions are greatly appreciated!
**[www.mikekellyforcongress.com](http://www.trailblz.info/kellymike/gateway/1.129400.aspx)**

[To safely unsubscribe, please click here](http://www.trailblz.info/kellymike/Unsubscribe.aspx?eid=A3639956702C41A36C1D84C5E9E48DE8F4E9AACCE700DA5928D2E4CAA4525F40) | [Spam Policy](http://www.trailblz.com/spampolicy.aspx)

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com by mike@mikekellyforcongress.com
Mike Kelly For Congress | PO Box 476 | Lyndora | PA | 16045

subject: Parents, I want to hear from you!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Collins for Texas, Inc
body:
---
| | | | | | [ ](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0011PZLK4v7Z2URy_ZTT2mxQKd9gZWpnMUSwHqzG4359XNJCdLMIbOrDT8TMzkAWid6AIqbfGevWbNQjjigaz6O3p00uEMPcEWt0FW5R2Rhxufh9kZauMTIt1g2yoKKs6eFZbGJiX4dAsrhJasgMC6rUtUrIHZR0LUkIcrWs77PKXx4IDd1zEonvg==&c=3cCHVGdM27HTL5XAVwKoz5xPD_fUDAJ_MpXBoxD2kKf7r7iWiKNntA==&ch=_w4LzMuoGrVdGjpkVaK4CeyFFapsMvO6iAPlQsgICuoWhjjlh9Kaaw==)
---
| Peter,
Educating the next generation of Texans is one of the most important priorities we have. I want to know how the process of educating your children has gone during COVID-19.
Are local school districts doing a good job? Do you and your kids have the resources you need? Is there any way in which local, state, or federal government could be doing better?
Please click or tap on the image below to take our quick education survey.
---
| [ ](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0011PZLK4v7Z2URy_ZTT2mxQKd9gZWpnMUSwHqzG4359XNJCdLMIbOrDXYvLlaiRYhlYSTAHEZgqe4f5AWx_iUy4nZGx2Muh1XI8O8yga1qaitz8gYgRAQvw9-XHQPUxEZZ6Sowg7goGy4tBZx58CKkAHwPZkgypx_9lN7H9yUYCYY=&c=3cCHVGdM27HTL5XAVwKoz5xPD_fUDAJ_MpXBoxD2kKf7r7iWiKNntA==&ch=_w4LzMuoGrVdGjpkVaK4CeyFFapsMvO6iAPlQsgICuoWhjjlh9Kaaw==)

I hope you and your family are staying safe and healthy!
Thank you and God bless,
---
|
---
| Genevieve Collins Candidate for Congressional District 32

* * *
---
Dear Friend, On April 13th, when President Trump was wrestling with the "decision" to end lock downs, I wrote that he "doesn't need a decision, he needs a plan." A plan he needed to unify the country behind. Five and a half weeks later - still no plan. The reopening is a patchwork of policies driven more by political considerations than data. And Congress? After a knee-jerk moment of bipartisanship to pass the CARES act, Congress has fallen back into its familiar gridlock pattern, with the House passing the HEROES act along party lines, and the Senate and the White House declaring it DOA. This moment demanded leadership, unity, and shared sacrifice. What we've gotten was an incompetent administration, Congress retreating to its ideological "safe zones", and an environment where the simple act of wearing a mask to protect our fellow Americans has become a polarized expression of political identity And the death toll approaches One. Hundred. Thousand. You have the right to expect more from you elected officials, and it's time for the voters of Central Texas to demand more. **Demand Better. [I need your help so please pitch in if you can](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/17572281/199004662/-1907457919?refcode=052120_line&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDUvMS83NDEzOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3NWM1OTZmYy02ZDliLWVhMTEtODZlOS0wMDE1NWQwM2I1ZGQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=3mUUovhsscpgnW2LddvlJ7AdaGanJuQnDbNBqyeDWK8=). name: Eugene DePasquale for Congress
subject: It’s time to stop putting big corporations over people
disclaimer_text: Paid for by DePasquale for PA 10
body:
We need leaders who are focused on solutions and will fight to prioritize our working families and small businesses in this time of crisis.
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/17575335/199054111/-2011467207?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NTE3NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4MGMwNDIzYS03ZjliLWVhMTEtODZlOS0wMDE1NWQwM2I1ZGQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=BHu8jdpoz-b_n4sf8J38j6GUdjNh9SntIyb3sX21K24=&emci=87303552-659b-ea11-86e9-00155d03b5dd&emdi=80c0423a-7f9b-ea11-86e9-00155d03b5dd&ceid=10203249) _We know that COVID-19 has impacted so many in our community, and we have adapted our campaign to this changing environment. During this difficult time, please only consider contributing to our campaign if you’re able to._
Team,
We are in the middle of a national public health crisis. People across the country are facing economic uncertainty, and yet we’re seeing relief being fast-tracked to big corporations over small businesses and working families.

**This just isn’t right.** Big corporations should not get to cut in line simply because they have the highest paid lobbyists. Congress should be focusing on providing relief for the very people hit hardest by this pandemic -- working families and small businesses struggling to stay afloat. Not bailing out big corporations.
[**Will you sign our petition calling on Congress to put the interests of people ahead of big corporations?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/17575336/199054112/-2011467207?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NTE3NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4MGMwNDIzYS03ZjliLWVhMTEtODZlOS0wMDE1NWQwM2I1ZGQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=BHu8jdpoz-b_n4sf8J38j6GUdjNh9SntIyb3sX21K24=&emci=87303552-659b-ea11-86e9-00155d03b5dd&emdi=80c0423a-7f9b-ea11-86e9-00155d03b5dd&ceid=10203249)
| [End corporate bailouts](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/17575337/199054113/-2011467207?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NTE3NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4MGMwNDIzYS03ZjliLWVhMTEtODZlOS0wMDE1NWQwM2I1ZGQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=BHu8jdpoz-b_n4sf8J38j6GUdjNh9SntIyb3sX21K24=&emci=87303552-659b-ea11-86e9-00155d03b5dd&emdi=80c0423a-7f9b-ea11-86e9-00155d03b5dd&ceid=10203249)
---

**Team, we need leaders who are focused on solutions and will fight to prioritize our working families and small businesses in this time of crisis.**

As Auditor General, Eugene has focused on fixing government dysfunction and has a proven track record of holding people accountable. During this national public health crisis, Eugene has been a leader in calling for transparency in relief efforts.

[**Will you stand with Eugene in calling to put an end to corporate bailouts and to start prioritizing working families and small businesses?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/17575338/199054114/-2011467207?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NTE3NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4MGMwNDIzYS03ZjliLWVhMTEtODZlOS0wMDE1NWQwM2I1ZGQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=BHu8jdpoz-b_n4sf8J38j6GUdjNh9SntIyb3sX21K24=&emci=87303552-659b-ea11-86e9-00155d03b5dd&emdi=80c0423a-7f9b-ea11-86e9-00155d03b5dd&ceid=10203249) [Add my name](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/17575339/199054115/-2011467207?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NTE3NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4MGMwNDIzYS03ZjliLWVhMTEtODZlOS0wMDE1NWQwM2I1ZGQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=BHu8jdpoz-b_n4sf8J38j6GUdjNh9SntIyb3sX21K24=&emci=87303552-659b-ea11-86e9-00155d03b5dd&emdi=80c0423a-7f9b-ea11-86e9-00155d03b5dd&ceid=10203249)
---

clean_body: We need leaders who are focused on solutions and will fight to prioritize our working families and small businesses in this time of crisis. We know that COVID-19 has impacted so many in our community, and we have adapted our campaign to this changing environment. During this difficult time, please only consider contributing to our campaign if you’re able to. Team, We are in the middle of a national public health crisis. People across the country are facing economic uncertainty, and yet we’re seeing relief being fast-tracked to big corporations over small businesses and working families. This just isn’t right. Big corporations should not get to cut in line simply because they have the highest paid lobbyists. Congress should be focusing on providing relief for the very people hit hardest by this pandemic -- working families and small businesses struggling to stay afloat. Not bailing out big corporations. | Team, we need leaders who are focused on solutions and will fight to prioritize our working families and small businesses in this time of crisis. As Auditor General, Eugene has focused on fixing government dysfunction and has a proven track record of holding people accountable. During this national public health crisis, Eugene has been a leader in calling for transparency in relief efforts. name: Reverend Warnock
subject: we're at a crossroads (falling short)
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Warnock for Georgia
body:
I can't win this fight alone.
| | |
---
Friend,

We're in a fight for the soul of our nation's democracy, and I need your help to win it.
I'm a pastor and community leader, and I'm running a people-powered campaign to flip Georgia blue and restore moral leadership to our government. **We have a once-in-a-lifetime opportunity to win this race and take back the Senate:**
* Unelected Sen. Kelly Loeffler (R-GA) is mired in scandal over insider trading allegations - and new polling shows that Democrats CAN flip this seat.
* But Loeffler just launched a staggering $4 million TV ad blitz to buy this seat, and POLITICO says Mitch McConnell is lining up the full backing of the Republican establishment to keep this seat red and protect his GOP majority.
* We need to raise another $13,312 from grassroots supporters by midnight to fight back, flip Georgia blue and take back the Senate for Democrats - but time is running out, and we're still falling short.

While my opponent is a former Wall Street exec who's cashing in on her public office and being accused of insider trading, I'm someone who's dedicated his life to service. I'm running for Senate to end GOP corruption and restore moral leadership to our government - **but I can 't win this fight alone.**
**Friend, we 're on track to miss our critical fundraising goal unless grassroots folks like you give now to get us back on track. With Senate control at stake, I have to ask: [_Will you give $5 - as much as you can afford before midnight tonight - to make sure we have what it takes to flip Georgia blue, take back the Senate and restore moral leadership to Washington?_](https://secure.warnockforgeorgia.com/page/m/60b3e787/288179be/beb3dad/348ea7cd/1381925964/VEsH/p/eyJlM3NnWVdKd1lXZGxJSDE5Ijoid2Fybm9jay1mb3ItZ2VvcmdpYV9lbWFpbCIsImUzc2djbVZtWTI5a1pTQjlmUT09IjoianRrMjM1LWZyLW5kIiwiZTNzZ1RGQkJRVkYxWlhKNVUzUnlhVzVuSUgxOSI6IjUsMjUsNTAsMTAwLDI1MCw1MDAiLCJlM3NnWVdKeVpXTjFjbkpwYm1jZ2ZYMD0iOiIifQ%3D%3D/?g=3wiJLcQot1BeM8zu13FVD5A "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/warnock-for-georgia_email?refcode=jtk235-fr-nd&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500")**

name: Dean Browning
subject: The Chronicles of Liberal, Lying Lisa Scheller: Chapter 6: Gun Grabbing Lisa
body:
Have you been seeing what the Bloomberg funded anti-gun lobby has been pushing in Washington and around the country?
---
| | | | | |
---
| Dear Patriot,
Have you been seeing what the Bloomberg funded anti-gun lobby has been pushing in Washington and around the country?
Not only do they want to TAKE YOUR GUNS, but they also want to register ALL gun owners through back door gun registration.
Now instead of aiming her sights on the real problems, Liberal, Lying Lisa Scheller has publicly attacked my stance on the Second Amendment, claiming that I am anti-gun...
When in fact - I have been a life member with the NRA for over 20 years and a concealed weapons permit holder for over 10.
I have been given an A rating by the NRA for this upcoming election - the highest rating possible for a non-incumbent!
I have the same position that the NRA does when it comes to keeping firearms out of the hands of the severely mentally ill while not infringing on the constitutional rights of others.
...which makes me wonder, what is Lying Lisa's stance on guns?
It's hard to know. Lisa refuses to debate me. She refuses to fill our voter surveys with her positions on issues. Worse, she opposes President Trump and many of his policies. My guess? Lisa will be a "RINO" on guns!
This election is about who will ALWAYS stand up for your constitutional rights, regardless of what the Washington Swamp pressures politicians to do!
I would NEVER support any policy, agenda, initiative, or even notion that infringes even the slightest bit on our Second Amendment rights.
But I cannot fight for your Second Amendment rights without getting elected into office first.
As you know, campaigns are not cheap, and we have just a few days left to push our message throughout the district.
Can I count on you for your most generous contribution today?
---
| | | [DONATE NOW!](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001tmZAx2J-ZObLWNDz-jZVWcxSIKi1yHWVsGL3jqLVRdokNMhjKiL92YPbXRgWvhEQNjMJNrScARYZ9zc8nZv-rFsmneQIn4pWdvWJLaYtUSycHPGRWiG3f8dqwhI3RJO1VznCVJNqaUkS9Vxiy_V0BHR7GClu7ostjzglmLvvszXG_A7X1jzXjQ==&c=XRaVrZFs70mun2rjTt3VKIUrsf1A_0XSjISECWKRrJkNnIIMAALeHQ==&ch=Ws6XtNGEvEpyxwYviQYOoTRN-bFjV_LtNJAkyr3i-ZyppPrYgvN1dw==)
---
| So-called "common-sense gun control" has little to do with public safety or even stopping deranged mass murderers...
...but it has everything to do with slowly chipping away at the God-given rights of law-abiding Americans.
That's why each of us must take a stand to elect a PRO-GUN, Trump conservative. You have my word, in Congress, I will FIGHT to protect and TAKE BACK our Second Amendment rights.
Specifically, I will OPPOSE any type of gun confiscation law - such as "Red Flag." These types of laws DO NOT have any provision for due process and aim to take LEGAL firearms away from law-abiding citizens.
Too many Republicans, like Liberal, Lying Lisa Scheller, call themselves "conservatives" but don't vote that way when they get into office on issues like gun rights.
I assure you, I will be different.
From day one, I will be a rock-solid conservative and never waver in defense of our Constitution and our God-given rights to life, liberty, and the pursuit of happiness. But I can't do this without your help!
Can I count on you to give your most generous contribution to my campaign today?
---
| | | [DONATE NOW!](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001tmZAx2J-ZObLWNDz-jZVWcxSIKi1yHWVsGL3jqLVRdokNMhjKiL92YPbXRgWvhEQNjMJNrScARYZ9zc8nZv-rFsmneQIn4pWdvWJLaYtUSycHPGRWiG3f8dqwhI3RJO1VznCVJNqaUkS9Vxiy_V0BHR7GClu7ostjzglmLvvszXG_A7X1jzXjQ==&c=XRaVrZFs70mun2rjTt3VKIUrsf1A_0XSjISECWKRrJkNnIIMAALeHQ==&ch=Ws6XtNGEvEpyxwYviQYOoTRN-bFjV_LtNJAkyr3i-ZyppPrYgvN1dw==)
---
| Stay tuned for the next chapter in The Chronicles of Liberal, Lying Lisa Scheller!
For Liberty,
---
|
---
| Dean Browning Conservative Republican for Congress, PA-07
P.S. did you know Lisa Scheller has been LYING to your friends, family, and neighbors in our district!
She has even gone so far to say that I am anti-gun!
This couldn't be further from the truth!
Can you help me set the record straight by donating to my campaign today?
---
| | | [DONATE NOW!](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001tmZAx2J-ZObLWNDz-jZVWcxSIKi1yHWVsGL3jqLVRdokNMhjKiL92YPbXRgWvhEQNjMJNrScARYZ9zc8nZv-rFsmneQIn4pWdvWJLaYtUSycHPGRWiG3f8dqwhI3RJO1VznCVJNqaUkS9Vxiy_V0BHR7GClu7ostjzglmLvvszXG_A7X1jzXjQ==&c=XRaVrZFs70mun2rjTt3VKIUrsf1A_0XSjISECWKRrJkNnIIMAALeHQ==&ch=Ws6XtNGEvEpyxwYviQYOoTRN-bFjV_LtNJAkyr3i-ZyppPrYgvN1dw==)
---

name: Gov. Mike Huckabee
subject: God or the Nanny State?
body:
Peter,
Not sure about you, but I’ve been thinking a lot recently about the lessons we should be learning and what I want America to look like once this whole pandemic ends -- and yes, it will end.
As I see people testing the limits and clamoring to return to normalcy, I’m not surprised. It’s in our DNA, and it’s why I said on Fox News earlier this week that it’s time to let people be Americans. We need a more common sense balance between heavy-handed lockdowns and trusting people to show some personal responsibility.
Ultimately, Americans are not people who pray at the altar of the Nanny state -- and as many states begin to loosen up, it’s time that we show that.
**Politicians across this country cannot think that telling millions of people they can’t worship together is something we will tolerate for very long.**
The men and women who settled the New World and built what came to be known as America did it first and foremost to honor God. We cannot forget that.
[If, like me, you wish to be on the frontlines of this revival I humbly encourage you to make a donation of whatever you can to My Faith Votes](https://secured.myfaithvotes.org/p200520apl01?e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e200521apl01nd&n=1).
With their laser-like focus on registering and turning out Christians to vote, no organization is working harder to transform our communities and influencing our nation with biblical truth. I am proud to serve as Honorary National Chairman and [your support would be greatly appreciated](https://secured.myfaithvotes.org/p200520apl01?e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e200521apl01nd&n=2).
In 2016, many were resigned to believe that millions of Christian voters were destined to sit on the sidelines. My Faith Votes proved the doubters wrong.
To those of us with a biblical worldview, there are so many issues of importance in 2020 that will require our participation. From protecting life and religious liberty to ensuring we continue to confirm the right kind of judges, we have our work cut out for us.
[Your continued support is absolutely essential](https://secured.myfaithvotes.org/p200520apl01?e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e200521apl01nd&n=3), and we are all very grateful for it.
[](https://secured.myfaithvotes.org/p200520apl01?e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e200521apl01nd&n=4)
**United. We Stand.**
Gov. Mike Huckabee
Honorary National Chairman
[](https://www2.myfaithvotes.org/r?u=FvZODUdzRCV4_QVEoUI5Y_LYDGbWPUdf00keax2EMv8&e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e200521apl01nd&n=5)
©2020 My Faith Votes
10940 S Parker, 640, Parker, CO 80134
This email was sent to [dpwillis67@gmail.com](mailto:dpwillis67@gmail.com).
To stop receiving emails, [click here](https://www2.myfaithvotes.org/unsubscribe?e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e200521apl01nd&n=6).

Federal law prohibits contributions to the committee from the general treasury funds of a corporation, labor organizations or national banks (including corporate or other business entity credit cards), from any person contributing another’s funds, from a Federal government contractor, or from a foreign national who lacks permanent resident status.

body:
Our campaign has raised an additional $30,000 from small donations since Tuesday alone.
#
Exciting news: ever since we announced our big endorsements from Kentucky lawmakers on Tuesday, our campaign has received a big wave of small donations:
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/17578211/199098768/1360887822?refcode=em20200521&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83ODg4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2ZDg2N2ViNC04ZjliLWVhMTEtODZlOS0wMDE1NWQwM2I1ZGQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=vuji4F1QX4jpIKVEtgF0dWfDS_47vKY3g2TJB5DmEjw=)

With just 33 days left, we're beginning to increase our voter outreach exponentially, expand our video ad campaigns to new mediums, all while keeping the lights on in our 100% remote campaign: purchasing tech tools, renewing subscriptions, and paying phone bills and data plans.
**We don't have billionaire friends or Big Oil CEOs we can call up to pay for all of this.** This movement is being built by people like you who understand how powerful we are when we work together.
We need a massive, diverse coalition of supporters to come together and fight for our progressive values. **[Please make a contribution to our campaign today – $5 or whatever you can at the moment. body:
Tomorrow is the LAST DAY to request your absentee ballot. Don’t miss your chance to vote in the June 2 primary **Election Day is less than 2 weeks away!** _**The deadline to request your absentee ballot is TODAY**_ **[REQUEST YOUR ABSENTEE BALLOT>>>](http://links.gregpenceforcongress.com/u/click?_t=c56a42391aaa4fc29673628e10310dda&_m=1b8d31b4c136460caa8e24be95d39721&_e=8-qtA3tPBktb_CglL6GeKjjhjt2NA4RKxoi1Y-4REWkajKhWhq5hUhd7zSRStR7OoV-pLWpQgZdghbgrNx7s7XFW9nVuGqWdjnRCUzwwX08SYkxtCHXhkmbpk1puycuGW5B_pTxi3l9BIhtk7-JXCX8d8mR32JSEay6phMz2t2RPkPQxd6sNSgNimf1fdPP1g52zIHWm-Njg7T-Us6zqDy2zIESi3OH8-exRL_Ow30LfP6JcA3Am54EC4WcY_uLLW5-t96O-44UrCl8y9oTyBhQuWYk9uF4Js04HG2JhkAOfdi7gmAT8iu3fttjiT6ooEyNG0zCeVFfI3O-jKEBKZ26KxJiYKFwkcprwWPvcr7ukwMjsakM5t2LXpCZQt1-9tLd8dVUjagQ_dRbA3tcIfg%3D%3D)** Friend, We’re just 12 days away from our June 2 primary election – are you ready to vote this year?
**Today is the last day to request an absentee ballot. Request your ballot below while you still can!** [**REQUEST YOUR ABSENTEE BALLOT**](http://links.gregpenceforcongress.com/u/click?_t=c56a42391aaa4fc29673628e10310dda&_m=1b8d31b4c136460caa8e24be95d39721&_e=8-qtA3tPBktb_CglL6GeKjjhjt2NA4RKxoi1Y-4REWkajKhWhq5hUhd7zSRStR7OoV-pLWpQgZdghbgrNx7s7XFW9nVuGqWdjnRCUzwwX08SYkxtCHXhkmbpk1puycuGW5B_pTxi3l9BIhtk7-JXCX8d8mR32JSEay6phMz2t2RPkPQxd6sNSgNimf1fdPP1mDOtI3EPl4eYGcc9ztLHvz2NDJ1DR6e_-A4FTirtkU5IplTxz3_9I0y1d71ZCebwg_LH1hZ0hMM9t5M5xCOkvi4ICJ-hOrUe7K2ukPpYCNVkVLyNN9BL9ZTq67vYmUhPTUAuV63O3p6ygNkNtnof8bef7wwKzPC8XXST1xwTQgCJa_j98db2T-M2Wo88L9L4smH-EqjNT_CHUl_1o2aL9g%3D%3D) Hoosiers are being encouraged to vote by mail this year as we continue our efforts to stop the spread of the coronavirus, and that means one thing:

| **In 2016,** Kentucky’s 6th Congressional District appeared out of reach _—_ Democrats lost by 20 points. **Two years later,** we came within just 3 points of flipping this district. **In November 2019,** Andy Beshear carried KY-06 by a 14-point margin. **And just yesterday, a new poll proved what we’ve known all along: This seat is trending red to blue. In KY-06:**
* Joe Biden leads Donald Trump by 12 points: 52-40
* Mitch McConnell’s approval rating is deep underwater: just 30% of voters approve, with 58% disapproving
* Mitch McConnell trails his Democratic challenger by nearly 20 points: 36-54

**Mitch McConnell and Andy Barr are clearly vulnerable, and, for the millions of Kentuckians who are hurting, November can’t come soon enough.** Our district is done with Mitch McConnell. name: Operation Smile
subject: Sign this card for a child awaiting surgery
body:
[ ](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001r4KK-vTIDC8E91r1vuYCczIyU785hCMM58c0XU218lwv4qJ0qy7A3v1wNU6UbGUkOx_YbFv_FZNhU0JTQ-jlg_rNRc19sfXjrkSk63xJYZk694ne2PTFnwJ6eEM3akakx6ojSdHOAXeQLnzTPmmQCXlJTtl4xw4q0RRgBYcNNOqmlAi7q9k7S6IaL5USWjCHEOBTFJmMEcY=&c=bId5_ljIoDuoR1BbGktZDyrJy075iLrxYre-ogAiGl_fhkNn7qklaw==&ch=4JGFGklIx21abvUl-SFWeX3X_vHOSCa_yN6k-OSjMH4XZbbnTqm8VA==) Dear friend, You can change a child's life today. **A generous donor has agreed to give us $1 for every card that we get signed and addressed to a child awaiting life-changing surgery.** **[If you can take just a few seconds to sign this card for a child who's awaiting surgery for a cleft lip or cleft palate a child who is often mocked and ridiculed, unable to attend school, and unlikely to have friends that child's life will be changed.](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001r4KK-vTIDC8E91r1vuYCczIyU785hCMM58c0XU218lwv4qJ0qy7A3v1wNU6UbGUkOx_YbFv_FZNhU0JTQ-jlg_rNRc19sfXjrkSk63xJYZk694ne2PTFnwJ6eEM3akakx6ojSdHOAXeQLnzTPmmQCXlJTtl4xw4q0RRgBYcNNOqmlAi7q9k7S6IaL5USWjCHEOBTFJmMEcY=&c=bId5_ljIoDuoR1BbGktZDyrJy075iLrxYre-ogAiGl_fhkNn7qklaw==&ch=4JGFGklIx21abvUl-SFWeX3X_vHOSCa_yN6k-OSjMH4XZbbnTqm8VA==)** [ ](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001r4KK-vTIDC8E91r1vuYCczIyU785hCMM58c0XU218lwv4qJ0qy7A3v1wNU6UbGUkOx_YbFv_FZNhU0JTQ-jlg_rNRc19sfXjrkSk63xJYZk694ne2PTFnwJ6eEM3akakx6ojSdHOAXeQLnzTPmmQCXlJTtl4xw4q0RRgBYcNNOqmlAi7q9k7S6IaL5USWjCHEOBTFJmMEcY=&c=bId5_ljIoDuoR1BbGktZDyrJy075iLrxYre-ogAiGl_fhkNn7qklaw==&ch=4JGFGklIx21abvUl-SFWeX3X_vHOSCa_yN6k-OSjMH4XZbbnTqm8VA==) At Operation Smile, we'll do whatever it takes to provide free, life-changing cleft surgery to children in the poorest, most remote corners of the world because we believe every child deserves to smile. By the end of this month our goal is to collect 12,000 cards and ultimately $12,000 from a donor who's agreed to match us $1 for 1 card for children who are awaiting this surgery. **Before any intervention, eating and even speaking is difficult for children with cleft lip or cleft palate. Without help, they are likely condemned to a life of suffering because their parents cannot afford the necessary surgery.** **[But with your signature on this card today, you'll help us reach our goal of raising $12,000 from a generous donor. This $12,000 will allow us to provide a complete surgery for 50 children in some of the poorest corners of the world.](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001r4KK-vTIDC8E91r1vuYCczIyU785hCMM58c0XU218lwv4qJ0qy7A3v1wNU6UbGUkOx_YbFv_FZNhU0JTQ-jlg_rNRc19sfXjrkSk63xJYZk694ne2PTFnwJ6eEM3akakx6ojSdHOAXeQLnzTPmmQCXlJTtl4xw4q0RRgBYcNNOqmlAi7q9k7S6IaL5USWjCHEOBTFJmMEcY=&c=bId5_ljIoDuoR1BbGktZDyrJy075iLrxYre-ogAiGl_fhkNn7qklaw==&ch=4JGFGklIx21abvUl-SFWeX3X_vHOSCa_yN6k-OSjMH4XZbbnTqm8VA==)** Every three minutes a child is born with a cleft condition. **Without surgery, as many as 9 out of 10 could die before their 20th birthday. Yet in many countries access to surgery much less cleft lip and cleft palate surgery is nearly impossible.** That's where Operation Smile comes in! For just $240, we can provide a complete surgery to a child during our upcoming medical missions in the Philippines, Vietnam, or Nicaragua. **[Your signature on this card today will help us reach our goal of offering 50 cleft lip or cleft palate surgeries to children who would otherwise not be able to afford the procedure, but it will also allow us to hand these children a card with a message of hope.](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001r4KK-vTIDC8E91r1vuYCczIyU785hCMM58c0XU218lwv4qJ0qy7A3v1wNU6UbGUkOx_YbFv_FZNhU0JTQ-jlg_rNRc19sfXjrkSk63xJYZk694ne2PTFnwJ6eEM3akakx6ojSdHOAXeQLnzTPmmQCXlJTtl4xw4q0RRgBYcNNOqmlAi7q9k7S6IaL5USWjCHEOBTFJmMEcY=&c=bId5_ljIoDuoR1BbGktZDyrJy075iLrxYre-ogAiGl_fhkNn7qklaw==&ch=4JGFGklIx21abvUl-SFWeX3X_vHOSCa_yN6k-OSjMH4XZbbnTqm8VA==)** All it takes is a few seconds you just have to click one of the links in this email, fill out a card for a child awaiting surgery, and that's it! We know it will mean so much to them to hear from you. **Through your compassion and generosity, we'll not only bring these children beautiful new smiles, but also the joy and confidence that comes from knowing people all over the world care about them.** While those waiting for surgery live with so much pain and suffering, they also live with an unwavering hope. I hope you'll join us and show them an abundance of hope and love through your personal message. **[Before the end of the month, we need to get 12,000 cards signed! With those 12,000 cards, a generous donor will gift us $12,000 and allow 50 children to receive life changing surgery.](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001r4KK-vTIDC8E91r1vuYCczIyU785hCMM58c0XU218lwv4qJ0qy7A3v1wNU6UbGUkOx_YbFv_FZNhU0JTQ-jlg_rNRc19sfXjrkSk63xJYZk694ne2PTFnwJ6eEM3akakx6ojSdHOAXeQLnzTPmmQCXlJTtl4xw4q0RRgBYcNNOqmlAi7q9k7S6IaL5USWjCHEOBTFJmMEcY=&c=bId5_ljIoDuoR1BbGktZDyrJy075iLrxYre-ogAiGl_fhkNn7qklaw==&ch=4JGFGklIx21abvUl-SFWeX3X_vHOSCa_yN6k-OSjMH4XZbbnTqm8VA==)** [ **Sign the Card** ](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001r4KK-vTIDC8E91r1vuYCczIyU785hCMM58c0XU218lwv4qJ0qy7A3v1wNU6UbGUkOx_YbFv_FZNhU0JTQ-jlg_rNRc19sfXjrkSk63xJYZk694ne2PTFnwJ6eEM3akakx6ojSdHOAXeQLnzTPmmQCXlJTtl4xw4q0RRgBYcNNOqmlAi7q9k7S6IaL5USWjCHEOBTFJmMEcY=&c=bId5_ljIoDuoR1BbGktZDyrJy075iLrxYre-ogAiGl_fhkNn7qklaw==&ch=4JGFGklIx21abvUl-SFWeX3X_vHOSCa_yN6k-OSjMH4XZbbnTqm8VA==) **[Please join us in changing a life today!](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001r4KK-vTIDC8E91r1vuYCczIyU785hCMM58c0XU218lwv4qJ0qy7A3v1wNU6UbGUkOx_YbFv_FZNhU0JTQ-jlg_rNRc19sfXjrkSk63xJYZk694ne2PTFnwJ6eEM3akakx6ojSdHOAXeQLnzTPmmQCXlJTtl4xw4q0RRgBYcNNOqmlAi7q9k7S6IaL5USWjCHEOBTFJmMEcY=&c=bId5_ljIoDuoR1BbGktZDyrJy075iLrxYre-ogAiGl_fhkNn7qklaw==&ch=4JGFGklIx21abvUl-SFWeX3X_vHOSCa_yN6k-OSjMH4XZbbnTqm8VA==)** With sincere gratitude, Dr. Bill Magee, Jr.

clean_body: == Dear friend, You can change a child's life today. A generous donor has agreed to give us $1 for every card that we get signed and addressed to a child awaiting life-changing surgery. == == At Operation Smile, we'll do whatever it takes to provide free, life-changing cleft surgery to children in the poorest, most remote corners of the world because we believe every child deserves to smile. By the end of this month our goal is to collect 12,000 cards and ultimately $12,000 from a donor who's agreed to match us $1 for 1 card for children who are awaiting this surgery. Before any intervention, eating and even speaking is difficult for children with cleft lip or cleft palate. Without help, they are likely condemned to a life of suffering because their parents cannot afford the necessary surgery. == Every three minutes a child is born with a cleft condition. Without surgery, as many as 9 out of 10 could die before their 20th birthday. Yet in many countries access to surgery much less cleft lip and cleft palate surgery is nearly impossible. That's where Operation Smile comes in! For just $240, we can provide a complete surgery to a child during our upcoming medical missions in the Philippines, Vietnam, or Nicaragua. == All it takes is a few seconds you just have to click one of the links in this email, fill out a card for a child awaiting surgery, and that's it! We know it will mean so much to them to hear from you. Through your compassion and generosity, we'll not only bring these children beautiful new smiles, but also the joy and confidence that comes from knowing people all over the world care about them. While those waiting for surgery live with so much pain and suffering, they also live with an unwavering hope. I hope you'll join us and show them an abundance of hope and love through your personal message. == == == With sincere gratitude, Dr. Bill Magee, Jr. Co-Founder and CEO Operation Smile | | Operation Smile | 3641 Faculty Boulevard, Virginia Beach, VA 23453 | | Sent by mailto:action@conservativenewsalert.net in collaboration with |

body:
We are in the toughest race in the country. Control of the White House and Senate will depend on who wins Arizona. The liberal media think we're finished; we need you to show them they are wrong!
[](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001EE0vj5m-kyzjhA72W-j21K-FMEJkfwaelAOzdMDyxULYuMJkYJ1ovASFe-tnBMLvLuYNwQTA0R-QMoE_mOwP4S2mkkCFrvDojMBNOU1272LN4k6FSzy1OdQYxWF1doPeqZXJUneB-vFz7iPjL2c9ZyaPFUzzyQMcrrUqhCISO3Sl9-bwgtuEUa14F6NBnah6fcGCC_f-fgTYVzleTxjMm6qzXCZMfJVmCKIjJFKpeyQwf5FFHte8_T7rKvNuRkdywy4xS6GOZDrnIL1-lFSTBnNUbpOcl_dE3b5TwfXb6wAP1OUKQTwzOzaYomYB24fLKF993qLiZGo1l28G8D2L9EACuyLxQAqUyhej5RkoHvCuEY3XG5qdbQCFXqNRLVHD_UDOZ6yrmiI=&c=vyqHc0wI9vjosslO-L4bcH2nJfWgvGXw-4PnDtBHoO4z2lhgnfBnbg==&ch=UXLIvILZ3DrRkpyftA1GKEW7jYqUVwg2QSOyfltuT-Cgt1iRf5JelQ==)
Friend, Martha is getting hammered with negative ads, partisan attacks, and now, news that the Democrats' momentum is putting control of the Senate within reach.

But there is no surrendering, no quitting, and absolutely no chance we are giving up.

**Martha has beaten the odds time and time again.** From initially being rejected from pilot training, she not only became the first woman in U.S. history to fly a fighter jet in combat, but also the first to command a fighter squadron.

Martha can and will win this fight. But she can't do it alone - She needs YOU. [**Please, chip in $25, $35, or $50 to help Martha keep Arizona 's seat and the Senate Majority red!**](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001EE0vj5m-kyzjhA72W-j21K-FMEJkfwaelAOzdMDyxULYuMJkYJ1ovASFe-tnBMLveO7nMmPBtmgRey2taj7yubYiPSmqOXKPjHs8Ab0RQTgJQQpCkkQ8xCXy7tGv7sR2eJ9DeGkQ2NmFSjCSVvAGGdXA8vqs92pmJndjHKxBAsgvKb9RoFlD8VtJNfJIrkBYmO5drGMR4ea9fihxKTmkhGKwXbj74NGWICsVNY7P2ofx6ctAuXg_oZa3bJYTogGxE41HtT6Qde1YyjMbWtqvMIbrfM4_MbdH3cxqOTI7SUcsijArbOQ5fADr-jIkMa8dVec2cU6J9LkAyKlqI-iuZzJThawZAOLG-2kQw3e1EKj_lN7e4mvFf0ORRzSFG0htNp0VXmgVcB4=&c=vyqHc0wI9vjosslO-L4bcH2nJfWgvGXw-4PnDtBHoO4z2lhgnfBnbg==&ch=UXLIvILZ3DrRkpyftA1GKEW7jYqUVwg2QSOyfltuT-Cgt1iRf5JelQ==)

From the battlefield to the Senate, Martha never backs down. The liberal media, powerful special interests, and angry Democrats have all come after her - but she is still fighting for the conservative agenda.

We are in the toughest race in the country. Control of the White House and Senate will depend on who wins Arizona. The liberal media think we're finished; we need you to show them they are wrong! [**Make an immediate contribution to get Martha the resources she needs to win in November.**](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001EE0vj5m-kyzjhA72W-j21K-FMEJkfwaelAOzdMDyxULYuMJkYJ1ovASFe-tnBMLvBSuw0kigVARAqmTjH0ve7NT6xNlTYeP5zJrEpu14V6aCUQk-vHd7ZxOUvNVmooQwhqg3mueAjCi0ayYAzjeqHfa5I7WqnoePcadDFXtXJFafBiQ6k_LGa82MZsD57nKk2rAscPebzoIHmr7dWfJg47I_FtnWPoIH2B1WfgsVY4dK5MFmYIPdjNc2A7op5sKutKDfmpMiY69DDtk9kpWd2k5X6GcQooBYUZAIs-vLiTZIF5SFPeUhlCwZ4vaFt7zHVVBj7UpB0l5Zdh7OfOgLJM1cMn_z_BfXbsO8cB8fauTznTz2TIP1S1g2r8oeN0qhmduatB7Kgzc=&c=vyqHc0wI9vjosslO-L4bcH2nJfWgvGXw-4PnDtBHoO4z2lhgnfBnbg==&ch=UXLIvILZ3DrRkpyftA1GKEW7jYqUVwg2QSOyfltuT-Cgt1iRf5JelQ==)

The battle for the Senate is in full swing. You can't stay on the sidelines with so much at stake! [**Let Democrats know to expect a fight - Chip in before 11:59 PM to help Martha and Republicans WIN!**](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001EE0vj5m-kyzjhA72W-j21K-FMEJkfwaelAOzdMDyxULYuMJkYJ1ovASFe-tnBMLvESuUIQIWs_ll5N_i_dxks7mb-zQqns2zEkOhvYQhsFxs28ZVry6kMc43uNPWD0t9PQqY7pc8wXWtRh_8gIghdwFDB3LM8MPbx5nnGlzEtewAVyjnJAezgljY0gCSrktMhbgZHi1bZYRzfwB0S-q7Hzbhujl16l1mh-Qky55TF1L_if8UAPG8kkTne_ceaFqyG3i7K9xqVSJJrjGwJl_Fz3SOPLspSj-xw2lHZw8rY4pRx6S1E5oXqDtdBReHdCmlbMZX9gckYZDDy_RPmqcHYoRw8Nue6KWe91IvoHHIBCVjFFa3Ldd1WXZyTMC7yp_bdzmUoWICw2A=&c=vyqHc0wI9vjosslO-L4bcH2nJfWgvGXw-4PnDtBHoO4z2lhgnfBnbg==&ch=UXLIvILZ3DrRkpyftA1GKEW7jYqUVwg2QSOyfltuT-Cgt1iRf5JelQ==)

subject: Montana Families > Insurance Insiders
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TROY DOWNING FOR MONTANA
body:
|

| |
---
| |
# _**WE NEED YOUR HELP TODAY**_
In just 12 days, Montana Republicans will choose their nominee for State Auditor. As in any primary, it’s our job as conservatives to nominate a candidate who shares our values but also a candidate that can go toe to toe with the Democrat and win.

It’s no secret that my opponents fail to check either of these boxes. Both are insurance industry insiders that not only lack conservative credentials but fail to connect with Montanans. In fact, both of my opponents are asking for your vote but neither could find the time to vote in both the primary and general elections in 2018. In this race, I’ve been honored and humbled by the outpouring of support I’ve received from hardworking Montanans. From ranchers and farmers, teachers, small business owners, friends, neighbors, and from proven conservatives like yourself. Donations like these show wide grassroots support. Join Team Downing and donate before 5:00pm tonight?
---
| [Donate Now](https://troydowning.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=7f12ce154379a6c3af4424424&id=f27da968cb&e=a212bb87cc "Donate Now")
---
| On the other hand, take a look at my opponents’ donors. One is almost exclusively supported by the very industry insiders the Auditor regulates. The other has almost no support outside of the family, or the family’s insurance company that also created a PAC and is dumping tens of thousands of dollars of dark money into this race. Neither has wide grassroots support. Follow the money!

Montanans know better than to hand the reins to insiders who are beholden to the industry they would be expected to regulate. Either of them in the Auditor's office would be good for their friends and family in the insurance industry but bad for hardworking Montana families. Say no to industry insiders regulating themselves against our interests. Please donate to get us across the finish line.
---
| [DONATE NOW](https://troydowning.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=7f12ce154379a6c3af4424424&id=3650a2ea03&e=a212bb87cc "DONATE NOW")
---
| With your help, we can keep a conservative in the Auditor’s office. A conservative that will support small business, back President Trump, hold bad actors accountable, and get government off our backs and out of our wallets. Best,
Troy Downing
---
|
---
---

---

We knew after her humiliating defeat in 2016 that she would do everything in her corrupt power to take down President Trump -- but it's worse than we could have ever imagined. **MUCH** worse.

subject: How The Obama Administration Weaponized Surveillance Laws To Target Trump
body:
"The story thus far is complex, but it reveals a disturbing abuse of power by the Obama administration that suggests..." | | | | [ ](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=259d2f3fde&e=3ee4985eea)
---
| | |
# **How The Obama Administration Weaponized Surveillance Laws To Target Trump**

“The drip-drip-drip of newly declassified documents related to the Trump-Russia investigation, together with recent reports that a classified leak against former National Security Advisor Michael Flynn might not have come from an unmasking request, leaves little doubt that the Obama administration weaponized federal surveillance laws to target Trump associates and undermine the incoming administration,” John Daniel Davidson writes in _The Federalist_.

“The story thus far is complex, but it reveals a disturbing abuse of power by the Obama administration that suggests congressional reform of federal surveillance laws is needed to ensure this never happens again.”

[Click here to read more.](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=67fe522ec5&e=3ee4985eea)
---
|
---
| “Susan Rice’s memo about a high-level Jan. 5, 2017, meeting plainly aimed to protect the then-national security adviser’s boss, President Barack Obama—but it’s backfiring spectacularly. Rice sent the Jan. 20, 12:15 p.m., note (recently declassified) to herself at literally the last minute: President Trump was sworn in at noon that day; her administration was headed out the door,” the [_New York Post_](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=0cbf4efcd5&e=3ee4985eea) editorial board writes.
---
|
---
| “When the last space shuttle launched in 2011, few people at NASA believed it would be nearly a decade before American astronauts would launch into space again from U.S. soil,” Kristin Fisher reports. Next week’s launch is “going to be a great, great source of inspiration for every American,” Vice President Mike Pence says. Read more in [Fox News](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=3d8a6176ac&e=3ee4985eea).
---
|
---
| Today, “President Donald Trump will hold a discussion on efforts to help distressed communities recover from the COVID-19 pandemic before touring a Ford manufacturing plant in [Michigan’s] Ypsilanti Township,” Malachi Barrett reports for [MLive.com](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=6823a8e6d3&e=3ee4985eea).
---
|

name: Elizabeth Warren
subject: Can you take a moment now to raise your voice and help protect our elections in Pennsylvania and across the country? We'll walk you through all the steps, and it will make a real difference.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Warren Democrats
body:
Today, we're launching a new campaign alongside Indivisible to demand safe voting in all 50 states, the District of Columbia, and Puerto Rico. And I'm asking you to join it. Will you take a moment now | | | [](https://act.elizabethwarren.com/page/m/28525726/45c30650/1cb4eff94/66e92dd7/2016794102/VEsH/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVm1hWEp6ZEc1aGJXVWxKUT09IjoiIiwiSlNWc1lYTjBibUZ0WlNVbCI6IiIsIkpTVjZhWEFsSlE9PSI6IjE4MzI2In0%3D/?g=4qwscq_HJ6FcsC0VbCsFfMA "https://elizabethwarren.com?source=em-header&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&zip=18326")
---
This is the most important election year of our lives -- and no one should be forced to choose between casting their vote and protecting their health.

That's why, last month, I laid out steps that our leaders need to take to protect our elections during the coronavirus crisis, like...
* Expanded vote-by-mail, including mailing every registered voter a ballot,
* Safer in-person voting locations,
* And expanded early voting periods.

But Republicans are practically dancing over the chance to exploit this pandemic to double-down on voter suppression.

**We need to fight even harder for our democracy. So today, we're launching a new campaign alongside Indivisible to demand safe voting in all 50 states, the District of Columbia, and Puerto Rico. And I'm asking you to join it.

[Please click here take a moment now to raise your voice and help protect our elections in Pennsylvania and across the country. We'll walk you through all the steps, and it will make a real difference.](https://act.elizabethwarren.com/page/m/28525726/45c30650/1cb4eff94/66e92dd6/2016794102/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZUVkVGVVJWOU9RVTFGSlNVPSI6IlBlbm5zeWx2YW5pYSIsImUzc2djbVZtWTI5a1pTQjlmUT09IjoiRU1SMTJPX09SR19MQVVfRV8yMDIwMDUyMV9WMVMxX1AifQ%3D%3D/?g=4qwscq_HJ6FcsC0VbCsFfMA "http://elizabethwarren.com/democracy?source=EMR12O_ORG_LAU_E_20200521_V1S1_P&state=Pennsylvania")**

This can't wait -- our government needs to start laying the groundwork now to prepare for safe, secure elections in November.

Our leaders know how to make it safe to vote. They just need to be persuaded to act -- and that's where you come in.

You can tell them that this is a priority for you. And you won't be alone. You'll be adding your voice to a conversation that's growing in Pennsylvania and across the country.

Now, sometimes, an issue like protecting our elections can feel so big that it's hard to get a handle on it. _Where can we even start to make a difference?_

But don't worry -- **[we've set up a tool that points you to ways you can join the fight from wherever you live.](https://act.elizabethwarren.com/page/m/28525726/45c30650/1cb4eff94/66e92dd6/2016794102/VEsF/p/eyJKU1ZUVkVGVVJWOU9RVTFGSlNVPSI6IlBlbm5zeWx2YW5pYSIsImUzc2djbVZtWTI5a1pTQjlmUT09IjoiRU1SMTJPX09SR19MQVVfRV8yMDIwMDUyMV9WMVMxX1AifQ%3D%3D/?g=4qwscq_HJ6FcsC0VbCsFfMA "http://elizabethwarren.com/democracy?source=EMR12O_ORG_LAU_E_20200521_V1S1_P&state=Pennsylvania")** Different states have different election rules and different needs, but this new resource is a one-stop shop for how you can help protect our democracy.

Here's the way I see it: In times like these, when people's lives and livelihoods are on the line, it is more important than ever that elected representatives are held accountable.

Together, by fighting for expanded vote-by-mail and safe in-person voting, we can guard the beating heart of our democracy.

[Click here to take action right now to demand safe voting and help protect our elections.](https://act.elizabethwarren.com/page/m/28525726/45c30650/1cb4eff94/66e92dd6/2016794102/VEsC/p/eyJKU1ZUVkVGVVJWOU9RVTFGSlNVPSI6IlBlbm5zeWx2YW5pYSIsImUzc2djbVZtWTI5a1pTQjlmUT09IjoiRU1SMTJPX09SR19MQVVfRV8yMDIwMDUyMV9WMVMxX1AifQ%3D%3D/?g=4qwscq_HJ6FcsC0VbCsFfMA "http://elizabethwarren.com/democracy?source=EMR12O_ORG_LAU_E_20200521_V1S1_P&state=Pennsylvania")

Thanks for being a part of this,

Elizabeth

| [**TAKE ACTION**](https://act.elizabethwarren.com/page/m/28525726/45c30650/1cb4eff94/66e92dd6/2016794102/VEsD/p/eyJKU1ZUVkVGVVJWOU9RVTFGSlNVPSI6IlBlbm5zeWx2YW5pYSIsImUzc2djbVZtWTI5a1pTQjlmUT09IjoiRU1SMTJPX09SR19MQVVfRV8yMDIwMDUyMV9WMVMxX1AifQ%3D%3D/?g=4qwscq_HJ6FcsC0VbCsFfMA "http://elizabethwarren.com/democracy?source=EMR12O_ORG_LAU_E_20200521_V1S1_P&state=Pennsylvania")
---

| | | [ ](https://act.elizabethwarren.com/page/m/28525726/45c30650/1cb4eff94/66e92dd9/2016794102/VEsA/?g=4qwscq_HJ6FcsC0VbCsFfMA "https://www.facebook.com/ElizabethWarren/") | [ ](https://act.elizabethwarren.com/page/m/28525726/45c30650/1cb4eff94/66e92dd8/2016794102/VEsB/?g=4qwscq_HJ6FcsC0VbCsFfMA "https://twitter.com/ewarren") | [ ](https://act.elizabethwarren.com/page/m/28525726/45c30650/1cb4eff94/66e92ddb/2016794102/VEsO/?g=4qwscq_HJ6FcsC0VbCsFfMA "https://www.instagram.com/elizabethwarren/") | [ ](https://act.elizabethwarren.com/page/m/28525726/45c30650/1cb4eff94/66e92dda/2016794102/VEsP/?g=4qwscq_HJ6FcsC0VbCsFfMA "https://www.youtube.com/channel/UCrj-0FxK19tgUR2EbHkBBGg/videos") | [ ](https://act.elizabethwarren.com/page/m/28525726/45c30650/1cb4eff94/66e92ddd/2016794102/VEsHBQ/?g=4qwscq_HJ6FcsC0VbCsFfMA "https://www.flickr.com/photos/elizabethwarren") | [ ](https://act.elizabethwarren.com/page/m/28525726/45c30650/1cb4eff94/66e92ddc/2016794102/VEsHBA/?g=4qwscq_HJ6FcsC0VbCsFfMA "https://medium.com/@teamwarren")

name: Holcomb Crew
subject: Phase 3 starts Friday
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Eric Holcomb for Indiana
body:
Governor Holcomb announced that most of Indiana will be entering Stage 3 of Indiana’s Back on Track plan this Friday. | | |
---|---|---
Friends,

_**"We're able to go to Stage 3 – with confidence – on Friday." – Gov. Holcomb**_

We’ve got some good news to share. _**Governor Holcomb announced that most of Indiana will be entering Stage 3 of Indiana’s Back on Track plan this Friday.**_ Marion, Lake and Cass counties will go into Stage 3 on June 1.

What does this mean?
* Social gatherings can include up to 100 people
* Restaurant can serve customers at 50% capacity
* Retail stores can operate at 75% capacity
* Gyms may reopen with restrictions
* Community pools and campgrounds can open
* Recreational sports practices may begin following guidelines (contact sports will need to wait)
* Basketball, tennis, soccer, baseball courts and fields may open
* Youth summer day camps may begin
* Raceways can begin competition with no spectators
* State park inns are reopening

Watch as Gov. Holcomb describes more about what this means for Hoosiers:
[ ](http://links.holcombforindiana.com/u/click?_t=60bbc6d769fe4010b248f63c6cb0e872&_m=42369b60a2c8425bbc8a71d8461d8a9e&_e=NYs3HVVfp1ssKPZjUdwSyb_9X5G9oyn2RcZKB9oZrZ8Efl7jEloqvRBUNq8kU53CP2nJWPWd7z5TkTj2I0ecvSB8iyT2Is5T0nEMPbaGgpqFvEAqUUbj2VuE2Wmb5YcIwh9LlkD2bDla1OaGCXCBeW_4z24g1wzeVmTr2UB6n0ZB9bwiB7OzweL5t37HpBwhxUoZfEfjXpR1NKUmly02kNuaAOOtwAAtDoYmMpHdhA10m5uiACnMcGLB_8CG_2y466aTdEhlwGeugw3MQbbxsEQmjZ1kh6VXjwLVjrsfNjn9dYJAKGehY4iaFVW0nCHGM-hVO6aauJqq_01tXy-aIodKwOsCGi9L76wYHtrmaYd_K0bdUYXOeVYlyuClmhsqke7SwOd97YyVxnuJ5FPXHItfredQpikyQ2hp-GLLp_0%3D)
[**Watch Gov. Holcomb Detail Stage 3**](http://links.holcombforindiana.com/u/click?_t=60bbc6d769fe4010b248f63c6cb0e872&_m=42369b60a2c8425bbc8a71d8461d8a9e&_e=NYs3HVVfp1ssKPZjUdwSyb_9X5G9oyn2RcZKB9oZrZ8Efl7jEloqvRBUNq8kU53CP2nJWPWd7z5TkTj2I0ecvSB8iyT2Is5T0nEMPbaGgpqFvEAqUUbj2VuE2Wmb5YcIwh9LlkD2bDla1OaGCXCBeW_4z24g1wzeVmTr2UB6n0ZB9bwiB7OzweL5t37HpBwhxUoZfEfjXpR1NKUmly02kD0qL3Y-RSLUhW_wCXyUgh6RYbIudf9JLTQGHWJYhT1OUq28U8yYO-odC_4jzSJ4bMO8JrOTDq69wve3Q9f6vmzrOEMVaUgcYZU2tv0qwIklz8bOIUbNtkvVQ182CFxfrvODoR3sTRxlDJthHeh6H49zXfzCHrUXBl_wYK2pBJR65o7HZ7yTqSS4WAQMtq-OL06T87aLUDVRLpzwDazuI94%3D)
But why are we moving to Stage 3 on Friday? _**These decisions have always been data-driven, and the numbers don’t lie. As Governor Holcomb said, "Your actions add up and make a difference."**_

Indiana’s guiding reopening principles remain strong –
* **Hospitalizations** – The number of Hoosiers hospitalized with COVID-19 has dropped from 118 on April 14 to 53 on May 15.
* **Surge Capacity** – 39% of Indiana’s ICU beds are currently available, along with 81% of the state’s ventilators.
* **Testing** – Daily testing has increased to an average of 5,500 – 6,000 tests per day, with **[more than 180 testing sites](http://links.holcombforindiana.com/u/click?_t=60bbc6d769fe4010b248f63c6cb0e872&_m=42369b60a2c8425bbc8a71d8461d8a9e&_e=NYs3HVVfp1ssKPZjUdwSyT-sB54STU5HQ90e7STk0aBMx2d4MYEfyjxqz_jxI2uri1zt4TEYcX_LNEuQDfOkfEtdrbBi_jNGrqYJ-10jjB8Tlv2Q59jX3Xi9bGh8E0RRHQwK-93SHwKvPmKx25RB05hHXOWrXacAHxvrsBsC8Bm4qws6iZ0nRXh45quEJgeohXVEpAPjy0L0EN6yGCDeYvzPmLNMBtCuz1BvOFVY2q0X-GiY-vD52PZicLO3JnFdzCa5N6Bh1l9GyreQgAUHNnFD5JRh4dvDqO2_6v4qPKZAD8xjMKXBxzAsDpck9EmGYqNFy8lyLEmXl4qAaZmkKVKvnJLnhi-pvQEOe042bOV7YNfenPI-cXCUAkhweswJzo2ryaHeA9G7Rnm3eRqNYw%3D%3D)** available throughout the state.
* **Contact Tracing** – Indiana has more than 500 contact tracers on the job right now with a capacity for 7,500 calls each day, and that’s helping limit the virus’ spread

But it’s every Hoosier’s responsibility to make sure that we stay on track. And we do that by continuing to follow guidelines – wearing our masks, keeping a six feet distance from others, and practicing good personal hygiene.

_**"We've earned the ability to continue to move forward because people have been paying attention to wearing a mask, physical distancing -- it's really made a difference." – Gov. Holcomb**_

#BackonTrack,
-Your Holcomb Crew

Holcomb We’ve got some good news to share. Governor Holcomb announced that most of Indiana will be entering Stage 3 of Indiana’s Back on Track plan this Friday. Marion, Lake and Cass counties will go into Stage 3 on June 1. What does this mean? Social gatherings can include up to 100 people Restaurant can serve customers at 50% capacity Retail stores can operate at 75% capacity Gyms may reopen with restrictions Community pools and campgrounds can open Recreational sports practices may begin following guidelines (contact sports will need to wait) Basketball, tennis, soccer, baseball courts and fields may open Youth summer day camps may begin Raceways can begin competition with no spectators State park inns are reopening Watch as Gov. Holcomb describes more about what this means for Hoosiers: But why are we moving to Stage 3 on Friday? These decisions have always been data-driven, and the numbers don’t lie. As Governor Holcomb said, "Your actions add up and make a difference." Indiana’s guiding reopening principles remain strong – Hospitalizations – The number of Hoosiers hospitalized with COVID-19 has dropped from 118 on April 14 to 53 on May 15. Surge Capacity – 39% of Indiana’s ICU beds are currently available, along with 81% of the state’s ventilators. Testing – Daily testing has increased to an average of 5,500 – 6,000 tests per day, with available throughout the state. Contact Tracing – Indiana has more than 500 contact tracers on the job right now with a capacity for 7,500 calls each day, and that’s helping limit the virus’ spread But it’s every Hoosier’s responsibility to make sure that we stay on track. And we do that by continuing to follow guidelines – wearing our masks, keeping a six feet distance from others, and practicing good personal hygiene. "We've earned the ability to continue to move forward because people have been paying attention to wearing a mask, physical distancing -- it's really made a difference." – Gov. Holcomb #BackonTrack, -Your Holcomb Crew | | | | | Paid for by Eric Holcomb for Indiana. © Copyright 2020. All rights reserved. | | Eric Holcomb for Indiana, 101 W Ohio Street, Suite 2200, Indianapolis, IN 46204 | (317) 569-0709 | | This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com | | |

name: 2020 Republican Updates
subject: Can this really be the new normal?
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY FRIENDS OF TODD YOUNG, INC
body:
This week, the House of Representatives passed a historic $3 TRILLION package, the biggest in American history. This bill is just the latest of Democrats' partisan wishlist.
_Senator Todd Young is a fifth generation Hoosier whose commanding victory in 2016 led him to join the Senate Republican Majority.

Todd brings years of leadership experience from his background as a US Naval Academy graduate and a Marine. Todd's commitment to protecting conservative values and policies includes his fight for fiscal responsibility and America-first Foreign Affairs legislation. As a leading conservative voice in Washington, Todd simply wants to make government work better for his fellow Hoosiers and Americans nationwide.

This year, however, Todd's main priority is to defend Senate Republicans in battleground elections nationwide and he needs YOU to help him in this fight._
---
**ICYMI: HOUSE DEMOCRATS PASS $3 TRILLION SPENDING BILL**

Hey, Friend, we weren't sure if you had seen this yet, but this is huge.

This week, the House of Representatives passed a historic $3 TRILLION package, the biggest in American history. This bill is just the latest of Democrats' partisan wishlist, packing this bill with funding for things such as:
* Allowing undocumented immigrants to collect Economic Impact Payments
* Funding for self-proclaimed sanctuary cities
* Federalizes Elections enacts national vote by mail and prevents states from having voter ID requirements
* Gives $300 Million to programs like "The National Endowment for the Arts"

Friend, if Democrats can take the Senate in November, our new normal could be filled with pork.

Senator Todd Young (R-IN) has been a vocal opponent of the far-Left's out-of-control abuse of the American taxpayer, especially during the current crisis. Todd needs your help to fight back and support the Senate Republican Majority so that we can cap the Democrats' wild spending binge and get to helping hard-working Americans.

_**Will you step up and donate now to stand with Todd and fellow Senate Republicans in the fight against reckless spending?**_

name: Tiffany Muller
subject: This race is personal to me
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY MICHELLE FOR KANSAS
body:
Hi friends -- allow me to introduce myself!

My name is Tiffany Muller, and I'm the President and Executive Director of End Citizens United and Let America Vote. I wanted to bump this message for you in case you missed that **our grassroots-powered movement endorsed Michelle De La Isla for Kansas' 2nd district earlier this week!** ECU is dedicated to getting Big Money out of elections, and we are proud to work with Michelle in this fight.

You might be wondering why I'm personally reaching out, and it's because this wasn't just an ordinary endorsement for me. Like Michelle, I found my passion for public service when I served on the Topeka City Council. I still consider Kansas my home, and I know firsthand the type of leadership Kansans need in Congress to change a rigged system.

That’s why this race is personal to me. I know Michelle will fight to protect our democracy and place the people of Kansas before corporate special interests in Congress -- but she's not accepting any corporate PAC money, so she needs our help getting there.

**[Will you stand with me and show your support for Michelle's campaign? End Citizens United, the leading organization in the fight to get dark money out of politics and advance campaign finance reforms, has just announced they're endorsing Michelle. = ECU is standing with Michelle because she believes our democracy should prioritize people over corporate special interests. They know we can trust Michelle to fight for campaign finance reforms in Congress. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: = = = = = Michelle is running to lift up the voices of Kansans -- not corporate special interests. That's why she's refusing to accept a dime of corporate PAC money, so Kansans know she's fighting for them and no one else. But that means if we're going to have the resources it takes to send her to Congress to advocate for us, then we need grassroots supporters to step up right away. = Thanks, Team Michelle Michelle De La Isla is running for Congress to fight for families across KS-02. We understand that you may have other financial priorities during this challenging time. While we would greatly appreciate your support, please only contribute what you can. = PAID FOR BY MICHELLE FOR KANSAS Michelle for Kansas PO Box 67101 Topeka, KS 66667 If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please .

subject: A promising treatment

Our newest Follow the Data podcast episode

| _You're receiving this email because of your participation with Mike Bloomberg 2020. We'll be sending you updates like this on initiatives and issues we think you'll be interested in. Thank you!_ [](http://i.mikebloomberg.com/u/click?_t=8613ca2a3316453b8f979e9fa5797d01&_m=c735a7229f7e436aba4d563c54c32a0a&_e=AeUuZ4vMzq3ALzfzq4DnWBRALnW46vitYaGCFniBEBW3kalQlSk-6QKILt9lHQAERqWlM61zimsW6jEZpZQcxB08DRwKU2cOEhnF7u7YHRbp8nDev3_pnOw942ktvN4BAfTrJ4hwLNpobaM4WvlxBO9Zgud98IddFeJ-EeEJuNPEPTMyJl3OdCWz7P1IJr09XKBgROvp_zx0JQeH7gNFKmUxWDQj-UxELhG1AHtM9XlktEsZE24VHmRMVVMoPzZT5QBrBkcm6IrVngkDXLwKLLtewtKEgIDqNBe6bl95sN3onHYoDAojTqoMmqTElPTR) Friend, In the newest episode of our Follow the Data podcast series, infectious disease expert Dr. Arturo Casadevall discusses how blood plasma from recovered COVID-19 patients could be used to treat and prevent the disease in others. Dr. Casadevall is a Bloomberg Distinguished Professor at Johns Hopkins University. He joins Dr. Jessica Leighton from the Bloomberg Philanthropies public health team to explore the possibilities -- and challenges -- facing this potential treatment. The results so far are promising. name: Martha McSally
subject: Susan is key to protecting the Senate majority
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Collins for Senator
body:
Maine needs your help. There is no doubt about it -- Chuck Schumer and his Far Left allies are DETERMINED to flip the Senate and destroy our Republican majority in November. And a critical component of his plan includes taking Maine and unseating Susan Collins.
To unsubscribe click [here](http://links.mail1.digitalcampaignstrategies.com/ctt?ms=NDI1NTMzNDkS1&kn=12&r=ODQ4NzI0NzcxNjgxS0&b=0&j=MTc2MjA3Nzg5MAS2&mt=1&rt=0)
Peter,
_Maine needs your help._
There is no doubt about it -- Chuck Schumer and his Far Left allies are DETERMINED to flip the Senate and destroy our Republican majority in November. And a critical component of his plan includes **taking Maine** and **unseating Susan Collins.**
Susan has been a fighter ever since she was elected to the Senate. She gets things done for Maine and our country, and right now she needs YOUR support.
Chuck Schumer and his billionaire friends have funneled MILLIONS of dollars into Maine to spread lies and false attacks about Susan's record. We can't let Chuck's lies go unchecked! That is why I'm reaching out to you today...
[**Can I count on you to help my friend Susan Collins fight back against the completely false and outrageous attacks against her?**](http://links.mail1.digitalcampaignstrategies.com/ctt?ms=NDI1NTMzNDkS1&kn=8&r=ODQ4NzI0NzcxNjgxS0&b=0&j=MTc2MjA3Nzg5MAS2&mt=1&rt=0) Schumer and his handpicked opponent must be stopped, and the record must be set straight! The only way Susan will be able to fight back is with your support.
We must work together to protect our Senate majority. Susan and Maine need us now more than ever, [**please consider contributing anything you can to her campaign today!**](http://links.mail1.digitalcampaignstrategies.com/ctt?ms=NDI1NTMzNDkS1&kn=13&r=ODQ4NzI0NzcxNjgxS0&b=0&j=MTc2MjA3Nzg5MAS2&mt=1&rt=0)
Thank you for your support. We will win this fight!
In Service,

[](http://links.mail1.digitalcampaignstrategies.com/ctt?ms=NDI1NTMzNDkS1&kn=7&r=ODQ4NzI0NzcxNjgxS0&b=0&j=MTc2MjA3Nzg5MAS2&mt=1&rt=0)
Martha McSally
[STAND WITH SUSAN](http://links.mail1.digitalcampaignstrategies.com/ctt?ms=NDI1NTMzNDkS1&kn=4&r=ODQ4NzI0NzcxNjgxS0&b=0&j=MTc2MjA3Nzg5MAS2&mt=1&rt=0)

name: =?utf-8?Q?Dean=20Browning?=
subject: The Chronicles of Liberal, Lying Lisa Scheller: Chapter 6: Gun Grabbing Lisa
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY BROWNING FOR CONGRESS**
body:
Have you been seeing what the Bloomberg funded anti-gun lobby has been pushing in Washington and around the country? |
---
| |
---
| ,

Have you been seeing what the Bloomberg funded anti-gun lobby has been pushing in Washington and around the country?

**Not only do they want to TAKE YOUR GUNS, but they also want to register ALL gun owners through back door gun registration. **

Now instead of aiming her sights on the real problems, Liberal, Lying Lisa Scheller has publicly attacked my stance on the Second Amendment, claiming that I am anti-gun...

**When in fact - I have been a life member with the NRA for over 20 years and a concealed weapons permit holder for over 10.**

_I have been given an A rating by the NRA for this upcoming election – the highest rating possible for a non-incumbent!_

**I have the same position that the NRA does when it comes to keeping firearms out of the hands of the severely mentally ill while not infringing on the constitutional rights of others. **

**_...which makes me wonder, what is Lying Lisa’s stance on guns?_**

It’s hard to know. Lisa refuses to debate me. She refuses to fill our voter surveys with her positions on issues. Worse, she opposes President Trump and many of his policies. My guess? Lisa will be a “RINO” on guns!

**_This election is about who will ALWAYS stand up for your constitutional rights, regardless of what the Washington Swamp pressures politicians to do!_

I would NEVER support any policy, agenda, initiative, or even notion that infringes even the slightest bit on our Second Amendment rights.**

But I cannot fight for your Second Amendment rights without getting elected into office first.

As you know, campaigns are not cheap, and we have just a few days left to push our message throughout the district.

**Can I count on you for your most generous contribution today?**
---
| [DONATE NOW!](https://browningfrocongress.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=69dc25bfa90bd52cf57d45ea0&id=b4c2eb5f5c&e=6800876418 "DONATE NOW!")
---
| | So-called “common-sense gun control” has little to do with public safety or even stopping deranged mass murderers...

...but it has everything to do with slowly chipping away at the God-given rights of law-abiding Americans.

That’s why each of us must take a stand to elect a **PRO-GUN** , Trump conservative.
You have my word, in Congress, I will **FIGHT** to protect and **TAKE BACK** our Second Amendment rights.

Specifically, I will OPPOSE any type of gun confiscation law – such as “Red Flag.”
These types of laws DO NOT have any provision for due process and aim to take **LEGAL** firearms away from law-abiding citizens.

Too many Republicans, like Liberal, Lying Lisa Scheller, call themselves “conservatives” but don’t vote that way when they get into office on issues like gun rights. _**I assure you, I will be different.**_
From day one, I will be a rock-solid conservative and never waver in defense of our Constitution and our God-given rights to life, liberty, and the pursuit of happiness.
But I can’t do this without your help!

_Can I count on you to give your most generous contribution to my campaign today?_
---
| [DONATE NOW!](https://browningfrocongress.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=69dc25bfa90bd52cf57d45ea0&id=7e878eb2f3&e=6800876418 "DONATE NOW!")
---
| Stay tuned for the next chapter in **__The Chronicles of Liberal, Lying Lisa Scheller!__

For Liberty,**
---
|
---
| **Dean Browning
Conservative Republican for Congress, PA-07**

**P.S. did you know Lisa Scheller has been LYING to your friends, family, and neighbors in our district!**

She has even gone so far to say that I am anti-gun!

This couldn’t be further from the truth!

_**Can you help me set the record straight by donating to my campaign today?**_
---
| [DONATE NOW!](https://browningfrocongress.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=69dc25bfa90bd52cf57d45ea0&id=ce2b7fa8d0&e=6800876418 "DONATE NOW!")
---

---

Specifically, I will OPPOSE any type of gun confiscation law – such as “Red Flag.” These types of laws DO NOT have any provision for due process and aim to take LEGAL firearms away from law-abiding citizens. Too many Republicans, like Liberal, Lying Lisa Scheller, call themselves “conservatives” but don’t vote that way when they get into office on issues like gun rights. I assure you, I will be different. From day one, I will be a rock-solid conservative and never waver in defense of our Constitution and our God-given rights to life, liberty, and the pursuit of happiness. But I can’t do this without your help! Can I count on you to give your most generous contribution to my campaign today? | "DONATE NOW!" | Stay tuned for the next chapter in The Chronicles of Liberal, Lying Lisa Scheller! For Liberty, | | Dean Browning Conservative Republican for Congress, PA-07 P.S. did you know Lisa Scheller has been LYING to your friends, family, and neighbors in our district! She has even gone so far to say that I am anti-gun! This couldn’t be further from the truth! Can you help me set the record straight by donating to my campaign today? | "DONATE NOW!" | | | | | | | | | | | | PAID FOR BY BROWNING FOR CONGRESS | | Copyright © 2020 Browning For Congress, All rights reserved.

Friend --

Rodney Davis is fighting back against that agenda, but if we let Pelosi continue to spread fake news about him in this district then we won't stand a chance in November.

Indiana Republican,

One of the most watched races in 2020 will be right here in Indiana, and I’m rolling out an immediate call for all Hoosier Republicans to get involved. Indiana’s 5th Congressional District is considered a battleground race this election cycle.

It’s imperative that we don’t let the Democrats win.

Out-of-state liberals are pouring money into the Indiana’s 5th to try and flip the seat blue, and we have to immediately respond.

If you’re able, would you consider donating $5, $10, $25, $50, $100, or what you can to fund our 5th District Victory operation, making sure a principled conservative wins this seat? Click here to donate. (https://secure.winred.com/indiana-republican-party/pg-cdfr1-052020?utm_source=email_PG&utm_campaign=ingop&utm_medium=Email&utm_content=Battleground_in_Indiana&amount=&mc_cid=e3c092eaa3&mc_eid=[UNIQID])

We need to be ready the minute the primary’s over to support our nominee and make sure they win!

I have a plan for voter outreach, but I am counting on your support to see it through. This kind of grassroots voter contact can be expensive – but I know if we have Hoosiers pitching in across the state, we can make it happen.

As our country faces new challenges, it’s more important than ever we keep this seat in Republican hands. We need to flip the House and gain a new conservative majority in Congress.

As Indiana and the rest of the country begins to get back to work, we need to make sure we have members of Congress who will put people over politics, unlike Nancy Pelosi.

I know this remains a difficult time for many Hoosiers, but if you’re able, know that your support will make all the difference.

Please use the links below to rush your contribution:

name: Barbara Bollier
subject: Kansans need a Senator on their side
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Bollier for Kansas
body:
Team, we know we have a tough fight ahead, but that only makes me more excited to take it on. Because Kansans deserve a Senator who is on their side.

|
---

| | Team, Washington is a rough-and-tumble place. So as I’ve been talking to folks all over the state on our virtual bus tour, there’s a question that seems to be on a lot of Kansans’ minds: Am I tough enough to take on the status quo, win this Senate seat and change Washington? **The short answer:_Absolutely._** Believe me, I’ve been in public service for 11 years, I know people can be mean and ugly, but I’m tough. In Topeka, I learned to speak my mind and stand up to party leaders when it was in my district’s best interest. I’m a retired anesthesiologist. I did a difficult residency, and then I worked every day with some surgeons who would try to push me. But I had a job to do, I was there to help and heal people, so I stood up. That’s not enough, though. Public officials also need to know how to sit down -- to come to the table and seek agreement in a conscientious way; to listen, and not just talk. That’s the kind of behavior that will change Washington. I’m running to make that change. [**Will you pitch in $5 now to help me get to the Senate so I can work for real solutions for people in Kansas and across the country?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/17581969/199180484/1342039363?refcode=em200520i&amount=5&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&city=&state=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83ODE5NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0ZTJiZmE3YS1iMTliLWVhMTEtODZlOS0wMDE1NWQwM2I1ZGQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=gHAPhK6mHQW7fS8xRmC8_nPXjdoJp41Qkbku1dyk42U=) We’re all tired of the bickering and nastiness in Washington. We must demand better from our elected officials. I have been and will be the example of someone who can be tough and fight hard for her constituents, but also compromise and work across the aisle to get things done for real people. I want you to have a Senator who your kids can look up to, just like I always looked up to Senator Nancy Kassebaum. And we have the opportunity to make that happen this November. **Team, we know we have a tough fight ahead, but that only makes me more excited to take it on. Because Kansans deserve a Senator who is on their side.** [**We can send a voice of reason to the Senate, but I need your support to get there. Contribute $5 or whatever you can now to join me in this fight.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/17581970/199180485/1342039363?refcode=em200520i&amount=5&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&city=&state=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83ODE5NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0ZTJiZmE3YS1iMTliLWVhMTEtODZlOS0wMDE1NWQwM2I1ZGQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=gHAPhK6mHQW7fS8xRmC8_nPXjdoJp41Qkbku1dyk42U=) Thank you, Barbara Bollier **[CONTRIBUTE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/17581971/199180486/1342039363?refcode=em200520i&amount=5&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&city=&state=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83ODE5NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0ZTJiZmE3YS1iMTliLWVhMTEtODZlOS0wMDE1NWQwM2I1ZGQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=gHAPhK6mHQW7fS8xRmC8_nPXjdoJp41Qkbku1dyk42U=)**

name: Team Marsha
subject: China Threatens Senator Blackburn
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Marsha for Senate
body:
A Chinese government-controlled news agency has published threats to sanction Senator Marsha Blackburn for her efforts to expose China's role in the coronavirus pandemic.

If you would prefer not to receive future emails, click [here.](http://links.mail1.digitalcampaignstrategies.com/ctt?ms=NDI1NTQzMzMS1&kn=2&r=ODQ4NzI0NzcxNjgxS0&b=0&j=MTc2MjA4NDk4OQS2&mt=1&rt=0)
__

Peter,

A Chinese government-controlled news agency has published threats to sanction Senator Marsha Blackburn for her efforts to expose China's role in the coronavirus pandemic.

Marsha's led the fight against the Communist Party of China for their human rights violations and invasions of privacy. In light of the coronavirus pandemic, Marsha's continued to be on the offensive, calling China out for suppressing information that had the potential to contain the spread of this deadly disease. And she is committed to seeing this fight through:

"This time, they've been caught. And it is so important that we follow through with holding them accountable." \-- Marsha Blackburn, 5/17/20 on Fox News

Sign Marsha's petition now to hold China accountable! With enough signatures, Marsha hopes to show the radical Left and liberal special interest groups in Washington that Americans want to take action.

[**Sign Marsha 's petition to Hold China Accountable!**](http://links.mail1.digitalcampaignstrategies.com/ctt?ms=NDI1NTQzMzMS1&kn=3&r=ODQ4NzI0NzcxNjgxS0&b=0&j=MTc2MjA4NDk4OQS2&mt=1&rt=0)

Team Marsha

Paid for by Marsha for Senate

name: Alison
subject: Wanted to bring this to your attention
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY CORY GARDNER FOR SENATE
body:
If we don't act quickly, the far-Left will continue to gain momentum in this year's battleground Senate races - including ours here in Colorado - to flip the majority in Schumer's favor.
_Cory Gardner is a fifth generation Coloradan whose 2014 Senate victory was a watershed moment on behalf of Republicans nationwide. Cory 's win proved that similar to the rest of the country, Coloradans were fed up with the Democrats' empty promises. And in the last six years, Cory has tirelessly fought to uplift his fellow Americans through pro-growth policies and common-sense legislating.

And this year, Cory is facing another critical Battleground Election. National Democrats are investing millions in Colorado to flip the Senate from red to blue._
---
