clean_body: If we don't act quickly, the far-Left will continue to gain momentum in this year's battleground Senate races - including ours here in Colorado - to flip the majority in Schumer's favor. Cory Gardner is a fifth generation Coloradan whose 2014 Senate victory was a watershed moment on behalf of Republicans nationwide. Cory 's win proved that similar to the rest of the country, Coloradans were fed up with the Democrats' empty promises. And in the last six years, Cory has tirelessly fought to uplift his fellow Americans through pro-growth policies and common-sense legislating. And this year, Cory is facing another critical Battleground Election. National Democrats are investing millions in Colorado to flip the Senate from red to blue. A lot is going on right now, so I'll make this quick. ICYMI, Cory Gardner, just launched his == last week, and he already needs to raise an additional $25,000 to keep it on the air. But, did you see this headline from the other day about Democratic mega-donors starting to take an interest in our race? == Now isn't a time to remain on the sidelines. We need your immediate support to help Cory keep his ad on the air and put on a strong show of force against the Democratic establishment, and it's mega-donors. Rush in a contribution using any of the secure links below to access 5X Match on your donation: == == == == == == If we don 't act quickly, the far-Left will continue to gain momentum in this year's battleground Senate races - including ours here in Colorado - to flip the majority in Schumer's favor. | Friends, Memorial day is coming up and NH Democrats are showing their true colors. **Unfortunately, those colors aren't red, white and blue.** Democratic Executive Councilor Debora Pignatelli was asked to lead the Pledge of Allegiance at Wednesday's Memorial Day meeting and **intentionally changed the words "with liberty and justice for all" to "with liberty and justice for some."** Outrageous! We cannot allow these Democrats to keep getting away with this disgraceful, radical behavior. [Will you help us win back a majority at the State House by pledging $15, $25 or even $100 to the NH Senate Republicans?](https://click.ml.mailersend.com/link/c/YT0xNDI2MjQyNjM1NzkzNzAwODAzJmM9bzhqNCZlPTE5MjgmYj0zNTA0NjEzODgmZD15NmM0YzJr.yubRvlRs8b9cV8yKRHgE6RxClNgdQ8RJFqtAn47iMxs)

| New Hampshire is home to over 100,000 Veterans who served our nation to protect Liberty and Justice for ALL. Debora Pignatelli owes them all a serious apology for her radical, shameful behavior. You can read about it and hear the audio [here](https://click.ml.mailersend.com/link/c/YT0xNDI2MjQyNjM1NzkzNzAwODAzJmM9bzhqNCZlPTE5MjgmYj0zNTA0NjEzOTAmZD1rMWwyYjN3.0j_475lGuw62agEr8XuWMk3Psxm_7R4quBezV_Kuo6I). name: Charles Booker
subject: What Amy McGrath doesn’t have: you
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Booker for Kentucky
body:
The media likes to talk a lot about the money, resources, and connected friends that Amy McGrath’s campaign has. But they don’t have the most important resource that we need to win:
#
The media likes to talk a lot about the money, resources, and connected friends that Amy McGrath’s campaign has.
But they don’t have the most important resource that we need to win: **you.**
Your voice matters — don’t let anyone tell you otherwise. Don’t let the Democratic establishment or the Democratic Senatorial Campaign Committee tell you what’s right for us, because they don’t speak for us.
**We need to keep speaking our truth: it’s about damn time we change our politics and replace Mitch McConnell with a leader who truly understands what it means to be a working-class person in the United States today. **
**[If you’re with me in this fight, can you chip in $5 or anything you can spare today? Every dollar counts, especially as we get closer to closing the gap in this competitive primary.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/17582591/199196930/-1388222765?refcode=em20200521-2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83ODg4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2YWE3YzI4NC1iOTliLWVhMTEtODZlOS0wMDE1NWQwM2I1ZGQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=FgciS9gmG_79KE_jO0M-QLm6Qa9px949Q4yxEx3tfCw=)**
**[Contribute $5](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/17582592/199196931/-1388222765?refcode=em20200521-2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83ODg4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2YWE3YzI4NC1iOTliLWVhMTEtODZlOS0wMDE1NWQwM2I1ZGQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=FgciS9gmG_79KE_jO0M-QLm6Qa9px949Q4yxEx3tfCw=)**
It’s easy to be a Democrat and say I don’t like Mitch McConnell. **But that’s not enough.**
This election is bigger than just that — it’s about the kind of future we want for our children, human dignity, the health of our planet, the fight for equality, and our moral obligation to lift each other up.
Even after we beat Mitch, there are tough challenges ahead of us if we want to transform our state and end the generational poverty that has pervaded our communities in Kentucky. If you don’t have the solutions or the courage to fight for reform, then we can’t expect much to happen after the election.
**That’s why I’m advocating for a bold, progressive agenda that includes a Universal Basic Income, a Green New Deal, and Medicare for All.** These aren’t just policies to me, but _real forms of change. _
**[I know I’m not the only one hungry for change. If we all work together this election and stick up for the values that matter most to us, we can pull this off. Can you show your support today with a $5 contribution?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/17582593/199196932/-1388222765?refcode=em20200521-2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83ODg4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2YWE3YzI4NC1iOTliLWVhMTEtODZlOS0wMDE1NWQwM2I1ZGQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=FgciS9gmG_79KE_jO0M-QLm6Qa9px949Q4yxEx3tfCw=)**
**[contribute](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/17582594/199196933/-1388222765?refcode=em20200521-2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83ODg4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2YWE3YzI4NC1iOTliLWVhMTEtODZlOS0wMDE1NWQwM2I1ZGQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=FgciS9gmG_79KE_jO0M-QLm6Qa9px949Q4yxEx3tfCw=)**
Let’s do this together,
Charles

clean_body: The media likes to talk a lot about the money, resources, and connected friends that Amy McGrath’s campaign has. But they don’t have the most important resource that we need to win: The media likes to talk a lot about the money, resources, and connected friends that Amy McGrath’s campaign has. But they don’t have the most important resource that we need to win: you. Your voice matters — don’t let anyone tell you otherwise. Don’t let the Democratic establishment or the Democratic Senatorial Campaign Committee tell you what’s right for us, because they don’t speak for us. We need to keep speaking our truth: it’s about damn time we change our politics and replace Mitch McConnell with a leader who truly understands what it means to be a working-class person in the United States today. = = It’s easy to be a Democrat and say I don’t like Mitch McConnell. But that’s not enough. This election is bigger than just that — it’s about the kind of future we want for our children, human dignity, the health of our planet, the fight for equality, and our moral obligation to lift each other up. Even after we beat Mitch, there are tough challenges ahead of us if we want to transform our state and end the generational poverty that has pervaded our communities in Kentucky. If you don’t have the solutions or the courage to fight for reform, then we can’t expect much to happen after the election. That’s why I’m advocating for a bold, progressive agenda that includes a Universal Basic Income, a Green New Deal, and Medicare for All. These aren’t just policies to me, but real forms of change. = = Let’s do this together, Charles **=** | | ---|---|--- Paid for by Booker for Kentucky

It’s no secret that March’s Paycheck Protection Program (PPP) legislation fell short of what many small business owners hoped.

Too much of the support went to companies that didn’t need it, while the hardest-hit small businesses have struggled to benefit from the program and stay afloat in this collapsing economy.

Nearly 39 million people have lost their jobs in less than two months. We cannot allow small businesses to fail and risk turning temporary job losses into permanent ones.

[That’s why today I introduced the first and only bipartisan legislation to fix PPP and help small- and mid-sized businesses weather the next six months.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/17583069/199211209/726396919?source=EM_PET_B1_052120_NATL&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjgvMS83NDc5MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzYjc2MDY5OS1jMDliLWVhMTEtODZlOS0wMDE1NWQwM2I1ZGQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=2Gi_ZsSnPlKe5QMfAVWRkC9FD_F_qYazyawozT5344Y=&emci=40e08b14-9d9b-ea11-86e9-00155d03b5dd&emdi=3b760699-c09b-ea11-86e9-00155d03b5dd&ceid=1295540)

subject: re: absentee ballot request
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Claudia for Congress |
body:
President Trump is behind our campaign. Are you? [ ](http://links.claudiaforcongress.com/u/click?_t=e8d915629893476cb837806f005d02de&_m=8c5f738678c0464e92707701800ab731&_e=qhPLk7YOBKHVw7M-aLRVjFUzJx9Omjcm7rMCyN4r4M-EKyWboQWwKBqicFgudeWtoO7ZSnLlxlUdjnU4xMgoiUT2o7hvOT2y27RjmQ9sNUUXSjKjbSJiV1Blb-NPlh76lS6wUeBbbLA_-SQKc6BhNd6htI4zlBIaHoINbK6o9fKHXgD3F_6oqqk_Jr_uau5Ob_Xm97qYN7_pGQaJqmxyPKafn6GR6ldj5tY4zUCq0Y8uiyd1You-Vr5mfBTmR0Y94oXQY8_V_UzebybMMpmW1lM7y5mqO37BY5gx8hujV0UtNVIqxGTfiCcDpUSyCeZ8_gh6S7gyb63SdIg6FGbnKJoFai0SYS2HJBhFKKPtIJ5cThweMVvh90GBEHjwIMeGh1mGxWuCxzn0c8JzHx7ihw1PuiPt4qQX-NZsstVwEi4%3D) Peter, the **New York primary on June 23** will be here before we know it, and it’s on all of us to make sure that our friends and neighbors are ready to cast their votes when the time comes.
Have you requested your absentee ballot yet for our primary election? [**REQUEST YOUR BALLOT NOW**](http://links.claudiaforcongress.com/u/click?_t=e8d915629893476cb837806f005d02de&_m=8c5f738678c0464e92707701800ab731&_e=qhPLk7YOBKHVw7M-aLRVjFUzJx9Omjcm7rMCyN4r4M-EKyWboQWwKBqicFgudeWtoO7ZSnLlxlUdjnU4xMgoiUT2o7hvOT2y27RjmQ9sNUUXSjKjbSJiV1Blb-NPlh76lS6wUeBbbLA_-SQKc6BhNd6htI4zlBIaHoINbK6o9fKHXgD3F_6oqqk_Jr_uau5Ob_Xm97qYN7_pGQaJqmxyPAbf5KqlJ0FRhdUoP50ryrJJj2PEiIRBZdu_UJfE3X70PprInwcUTlL40TAopT6UvvCr893Z6MG7TaAACn2kQ2IlnbsSD46zJE8D8RCVfcGdtQqNBxcIDMdXCkTni1TEguQJSc001YTw7ZlZ_beqnbDHpWLFd70jgBgjDV3YYoWX5btI9dKIpmSU0bIYwyW33-v_6UiOv0KUxXH-LRbCOuA%3D) _**NOTE: In-person voting will still be an available option for those who want on June 23rd.**_
The stakes couldn’t be any higher in this election. We’re not just fighting to rescue our district from Anthony Brindisi’s lack of leadership. We’re fighting to take back control of the House for Republicans all across the country.
To help make that happen, I’ll first need your vote in the primary – whether in-person or by absentee ballot. **If you plan on voting by mail, request your absentee ballot here:[https://secure.claudiaforcongress.com/absentee-82552](http://links.claudiaforcongress.com/u/click?_t=e8d915629893476cb837806f005d02de&_m=8c5f738678c0464e92707701800ab731&_e=qhPLk7YOBKHVw7M-aLRVjFUzJx9Omjcm7rMCyN4r4M-EKyWboQWwKBqicFgudeWtoO7ZSnLlxlUdjnU4xMgoiUT2o7hvOT2y27RjmQ9sNUUXSjKjbSJiV1Blb-NPlh76lS6wUeBbbLA_-SQKc6BhNd6htI4zlBIaHoINbK6o9fKHXgD3F_6oqqk_Jr_uau5Ob_Xm97qYN7_pGQaJqmxyPCKPdB8sOxx3xXgdjFZknuUErcsjTFGvzTOboA6QibOss5xYR9rFwY3d_OBhwFheHZZpV3g5rFLbtD44nm9RFZhXzx3gre9_-pAXoRXxZA4AYLBywYB2KC9JVVnJzxYtZxbRexyUiCtD9acKJ8eUTbhCv3SWu3QLjV-d089KQbUZWkOOrsygxb2A_u9OoRK8r7OpPxgSK9owpOu8M86Ipik%3D)**
This House race has quickly become one of the most talked about races in the country, and this is going to be a true battleground district all the way until Election Day.
**That’s why President Trump is throwing his weight behind my campaign – he knows we have what it takes to win on June 23rd – but it’s on us to make it happen!**

| Peter \-
My friend Claire Chase is in a tight primary election race in New Mexico and her election is less than two weeks away.
Claire is a strong ally of President Trump, an experienced businesswoman and political outsider, and an incredible advocate for New Mexico's energy sector. She has thoroughly impressed me, and I want us all to support her.
But she is being attacked relentlessly. Not only did her primary opponent promote vicious lies about Claire, but Democrats recently announced they are actually SUPPORTING Claire's GOP opponent with $125,000. That is how scared they are of Claire Chase.

clean_body: | | | | | | Peter \- Did you hear the great news? Congressman Dan Crenshaw endorsed Claire today. In case you missed it, here's what Dan said: | \---------- Forwarded message --------- From: Dan Crenshaw Date: Thu, May 21, 2020 at 1:58 PM Subject: My friend Claire Chase needs our help now To: <dpwillis67@gmail.com> | == | Peter \- My friend Claire Chase is in a tight primary election race in New Mexico and her election is less than two weeks away. Claire is a strong ally of President Trump, an experienced businesswoman and political outsider, and an incredible advocate for New Mexico's energy sector. She has thoroughly impressed me, and I want us all to support her. But she is being attacked relentlessly. Not only did her primary opponent promote vicious lies about Claire, but Democrats recently announced they are actually SUPPORTING Claire's GOP opponent with $125,000. That is how scared they are of Claire Chase. | | | == | Peter - I'm asking you personally: == | ### | == | | | Paid for by Claire Chase for Congress, Inc. | | Claire Chase for Congress | PO Box 8010, Roswell, NM 88202 | | Sent by mailto:mike@clairechase.org

Peter, if we LOSE Gary Peters in Michigan -- we HAVE ZERO CHANCE of taking back the Senate. That's why we're setting up Michigan Rapid Response to be at the ready once Trump's visit is over! "" | | | "" | | "" | | "" | | "" | | "" | | "" "" Peters has been CONTINUALLY OUTRAISED by James -- and Trump is bound to rake in even more for his hand-picked Senate candidate. While James is depending on dark-money donors and special interests -- Gary Peters is counting on our grassroots network. Gary Peters needs the resources to compete in this TIED race | | "" | | "" | | "" | | "" | | "" | | "" Thanks! \-- the Voter Protection Project | "" | | Paid for by the Voter Protection Project and not authorized by any candidate or any candidate's committee. If you'd like to support the Voter Protection Project, you can "" We believe that emails are the best way for our campaign to stay in touch with supporters like you. But if you'd like to receive fewer emails, you can "" If you'd like to unsubscribe from all our emails, ""

name: Brandon, Team Christy
subject: We're onto November
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Christy Smith for Congress
body:
| []()
---

| | Peter --

I wanted to give you some insight into what our campaign is up to now that we are past the special election and onto November.

Each team of our campaign (field, finance, communications, digital, and more!) is coming together to look at ways we can better reach voters for this fall's election.

**An important thing to remember is that there will be even more voters turning out in November, and they are more likely to vote our way. We've seen that in polls, we've seen it in past elections, and we're going to see it this November.** And that is the key difference between the special and the general election.

We said it all along, the special was going to be tough, really tough. But it's a whole new ballgame in the fall.

For our campaign, that means we have to do more and run an even bigger operation. More mailers, more volunteers, more phone calls, more yard signs -- **more everything.**

**[Can you make sure we can make this plan a reality by chipping in $5 or more today?](https://secure.christyforcongress.org/page/m/14f6bba3/29776869/981622b/569f240f/1625490488/VEsH/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0yMF8yMDA1MjFfcGl2b3Q0LXMxIn0%3D/?g=TRA5GMQot1BeTNifStrWt_A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2005_email_christy?refcode=em20_200521_pivot4-s1")** If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | [Express Donate $5](https://secure.christyforcongress.org/page/m/14f6bba3/29776869/981622b/569f2408/1625490488/VEsE/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0yMF8yMDA1MjFfcGl2b3Q0LXMxIn0%3D/?g=TRA5GMQot1BeTNifStrWt_A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2005_email_christy?refcode=em20_200521_pivot4-s1&express_lane=true&amount=5") | [Express Donate $25](https://secure.christyforcongress.org/page/m/14f6bba3/29776869/981622b/569f2409/1625490488/VEsF/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0yMF8yMDA1MjFfcGl2b3Q0LXMxIn0%3D/?g=TRA5GMQot1BeTNifStrWt_A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2005_email_christy?refcode=em20_200521_pivot4-s1&express_lane=true&amount=25")

Thanks for stepping up!

\-- Brandon

name: Gina Raimondo
subject: Your daily Rhode Island COVID-19 update
body:
---
| | | | | |
---
| Hello friend,
Last week I announced that we will begin allowing summer camps and other youth summer programs to operate in person under new guidelines starting June 29. There's no question that going to camp will be a different experience this summer, but my team has been working hard for weeks to develop guidance, in consultation with providers, that will keep kids safe and let them have fun. Today, I want to show you what summer camp will look like this year.
---
| [ ](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0018Ede1YA1LDfIe109w5YSXcVihsdzSq4zo8X1_41wXIF15m35ZjBFm8mepgeQ6NkALVMM6ecpMEr5Pys7KXhySZfeN8XtF25kpv24oTH5CcD0Cmxlj7bY0O09-RLBNxk4Ew4_qTNqdGRG4I6pPErEgg0ux7Nj3MagIdETNg32JYINa1e_M45oGFOeBKCAF9TkIB5nql-pEx8=&c=ZA_d7Cnov8MY2j0W6Lveq0EILUY-ZIKrAovIMJaw15iYrccGk9JqCw==&ch=4hsKpDpsZRthD4wGjjDjcM9snzX-jqD8YlN0wia5qMpodPhk_LyTNg==)
---
| To stay up to date with Rhode Island's latest COVID-19 statistics, please check the Department of Health's [new data dashboard](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0018Ede1YA1LDfIe109w5YSXcVihsdzSq4zo8X1_41wXIF15m35ZjBFm8mepgeQ6NkALVMM6ecpMEr5Pys7KXhySZfeN8XtF25kpv24oTH5CcD0Cmxlj7bY0O09-RLBNxk4Ew4_qTNqdGRG4I6pPErEgg0ux7Nj3MagIdETNg32JYINa1e_M45oGFOeBKCAF9TkIB5nql-pEx8=&c=ZA_d7Cnov8MY2j0W6Lveq0EILUY-ZIKrAovIMJaw15iYrccGk9JqCw==&ch=4hsKpDpsZRthD4wGjjDjcM9snzX-jqD8YlN0wia5qMpodPhk_LyTNg==) for all the information you need about the spread of coronavirus in Rhode Island.
---
| To give you an idea of the guidance: Summer camp groups will be no larger than 15 people, including staff. These also have to be stable groups, meaning the same kids, staff, and counselors will be in the same group every day. Groups cannot be combined during drop-off or pick-up, or for large group recreation activities. Kids are not going to be able to change from one group to another--they'll need to stay in the same group for the entirety of the program. These stable groups will also need to be in the same space each day--whether that's a classroom or a separated, designated area in a larger room. These restrictions apply to sports camps. Summer camps will need to intensify their cleaning and sanitation protocols. It is absolutely critical that kids and staff are frequently washing their hands throughout the day. From the beginning we've known that hand washing is one of the easiest, most effective ways we can slow the spread of this virus. I know it's hard, especially for younger kids, but it's absolutely necessary. Programs will need to make sure that kids and staff have sufficient soap and hand sanitizer. They'll also need to follow strict cleaning and disinfection policies. Just like child care centers, summer camps will need to implement a screening program. Every day, camps will need to conduct a verbal screening for symptoms of COVID-19. Some programs may choose to also do temperature checks. And face coverings will be required for adults and staff and recommended for campers. We recognize that having kids--especially younger kids--wear face masks is not always realistic, especially in the summer. But whenever possible, it is strongly encouraged.
---
| [ ](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0018Ede1YA1LDfIe109w5YSXcVihsdzSq4zo8X1_41wXIF15m35ZjBFmzWTzgoEkxBB86k7nokTRKZptYQkKckQqJfPrH3j-nfL-oDqQRvJEb6Y1N8t2UZ7tViXSVgnm1acOE8GaXCjKzl_FYU2wr1hWbPVuilwhvWhDBX__ZxNOMldE0CsWU3dT3dpIAyXrzl5YuH8Qs8yyETUKkAnTQIu5jNazpnfysAfC0yyRgg17lc=&c=ZA_d7Cnov8MY2j0W6Lveq0EILUY-ZIKrAovIMJaw15iYrccGk9JqCw==&ch=4hsKpDpsZRthD4wGjjDjcM9snzX-jqD8YlN0wia5qMpodPhk_LyTNg==)
---
| I know that these rules will make summer camp a much different experience for our kids this year but we're going to everything we can to make sure they have fun. Tomorrow, I'm looking forward to sharing with you what Phase Two of our reopening will look like.
We're all in this together.
-Gina Raimondo Governor
P.S.: Information is our greatest weapon in the fight against COVID-19, If you or someone you know wants to sign up to receive these emails, you can use [this link](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0018Ede1YA1LDfIe109w5YSXcVihsdzSq4zo8X1_41wXIF15m35ZjBFmzWTzgoEkxBBWtdjGvf6mGad2SslDbT5rie-9KeZmroDTPQXTyRen8CbkyKcmVQ_h_P5vQkPnrwW-MjmIfzisg4qYyhVobvi9FDWUif2JlG7crYyUDKUskxcX5fr29SHy-siL-HRp77CV7dImw0uPPEc2So-uMEsM7u0waHGGfp5l43qRtaajCKKIXx93myalsfsENMm5yHdyq8KBqu6x1ZZIPjZslNcqHhNL7yr2NGUGijIXLXkjO76_m_6_AexhLWhX0fu34DQNgZ4oN36idk=&c=ZA_d7Cnov8MY2j0W6Lveq0EILUY-ZIKrAovIMJaw15iYrccGk9JqCw==&ch=4hsKpDpsZRthD4wGjjDjcM9snzX-jqD8YlN0wia5qMpodPhk_LyTNg==).
---
| | Governor's Office | 82 Smith Street, Providence, RI 02903
---
| [Unsubscribe dpwillis67@gmail.com](https://visitor.constantcontact.com/do?p=un&m=001_rvij1smacIHQplL2vH8YA%3D&ch=e9e38b2e-7e90-11ea-b887-d4ae5292c4bc&ca=864b091e-ae20-4a96-a9dd-19d11bd6d6c9)
---
[Update Profile](https://visitor.constantcontact.com/do?p=oo&m=001_rvij1smacIHQplL2vH8YA%3D&ch=e9e38b2e-7e90-11ea-b887-d4ae5292c4bc&ca=864b091e-ae20-4a96-a9dd-19d11bd6d6c9) | [About Constant Contact](http://www.constantcontact.com/legal/about-constant-contact)
Sent by [communications@governor.ri.gov](mailto:communications@governor.ri.gov) in collaboration with
| [ ](http://www.constantcontact.com/index.jsp?cc=nge&rmc=VF19_3GE)
---
[Try email marketing for free today!](http://www.constantcontact.com/index.jsp?cc=nge&rmc=VF19_3GE)

name: CNN Alert (via Blue Georgia)
subject: GOP: "Georgia is in play"
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Warnock for Georgia
body:
We've never had a better chance to flip this seat and take back the Senate for Democrats.
| | |
---
**BREAKING FROM CNN: SEN. PERDUE (R-GA) SAYS "GEORGIA IS IN PLAY" - THE GOP'S SENATE MAJORITY NOW IN REAL JEOPARDY!**
Friend, this changes everything: After attending a senators-only briefing on the dangers of the coronavirus pandemic, Republican Sen. Kelly Loeffler dumped $20 MILLION worth of stock while downplaying the crisis to her constituents. **Now, her campaign is REELING - and Georgia's other sitting senator, David Perdue (R), just confessed in a closed-door meeting that "the state of Georgia is in play." **
That's why a GOP super PAC is zeroing in on Georgia as a TOP target - and why Loeffler just booked $4 million in ads to attack Democrats to try and save her campaign. They know that if we lose in Georgia, Democrats have ___no_ chance at taking back the Senate.
Here's the good news: _Roll Call_ just ranked Loeffler as one of the most vulnerable senators up for election in the entire country, and a new poll out this week shows that we can WIN in Georgia. We have a historic opportunity to elect Reverend Raphael Warnock (D) as Georgia's first black senator, flip Georgia blue and restore moral leadership to Washington.
**But right now, Loeffler is spending $20 MILLION of her personal fortune to buy this seat - and we're falling $7,938 short of what we need to defeat her. With Senate control at stake - and the GOP more vulnerable than ever - we need to ask for your immediate grassroots support:**

name: Team Kathy
subject: NEWSLETTER: Updates from Kathy Manning, Democratic Candidate for NC-06
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Kathy Manning for Congress
body:
| |
---

MESSAGE FROM KATHY
---
This excellent episode of [The Daily](https://secure.kathymanningfornc.com/page/m/18d9d33c/3d199a51/2f4e7715/7364cd49/2570176656/VEsE/?g=Bm8FRTjfd5ld5gouxTH21cA "https://podcasts.apple.com/us/podcast/why-is-the-pandemic-killing-so-many-black-americans/id1200361736?i=1000475185367") discusses a critical issue: the disparate impact of the pandemic on the Black community. We are hosting a town hall on this issue with two local experts, Dr. Charlene Green and Dr. Pam Oliver on Tuesday, May 28 at 5:30. [Please join us.](https://secure.kathymanningfornc.com/page/m/18d9d33c/3d199a51/2f4e7715/7364cd46/2570176656/VEsF/?g=Bm8FRTjfd5ld5gouxTH21cA "https://bit.ly/2Wp8TYu")

---
|
**Support for Families in Forsyth County**

Feeling overwhelmed? We have school psychologists, counselors & social workers from WS/FCS available to speak, confidentially, on our Hotline. Call 336-661-3128 Monday through Friday, 10am-2pm.

**NC opens almost 200 coronavirus test sites.[Find one near you.](https://secure.kathymanningfornc.com/page/m/18d9d33c/3d199a51/2f4e7715/7364cd47/2570176656/VEsC/?g=Bm8FRTjfd5ld5gouxTH21cA "https://www.wral.com/coronavirus/nc-opens-almost-200-coronavirus-test-sites-find-one-near-you/19098487/?fbclid=IwAR3wEbMh7KczM27nSxEB9IBFPjCKVxo3TidON45vCN11xrSM4EBneS")**

|
---

| | |
---
| GIVING BACK
---

Thank you to the volunteers who managed this food drop off in support of Greensboro Urban Ministry! During these challenging times, GUM is feeding more Triad families than ever before. If you're in a position to help, add a couple of canned goods and non-perishable items to your next shopping trip to donate. For more information about local food pantries in our area, please visit **[http://kathymanningfornc.com/covid-19-response](https://secure.kathymanningfornc.com/page/m/18d9d33c/3d199a51/2f4e7715/7364cd7e/2570176656/VEsHBA/?g=Bm8FRTjfd5ld5gouxTH21cA "http://kathymanningfornc.com/covid-19-response")**

|
---

| | |
---
| EDUCATION
---

[**Devastated Budgets and Widening Inequities: How the Coronavirus Collapse Will Impact Schools**](https://secure.kathymanningfornc.com/page/m/18d9d33c/3d199a51/2f4e7715/7364cd7f/2570176656/VEsHBw/?g=Bm8FRTjfd5ld5gouxTH21cA "https://www.edweek.org/ew/articles/2020/05/09/devastated-budgets-and-widening-inequities-how-the.html?cmp=eml-contshr-shr")

Almost half of the nation's 13,000 school districts may be forced to make the deepest cuts to education spending in a generation--slashing programs and laying off hundreds of thousands of administrators, teachers and other staff--to fend off financial collapse brought on by the coronavirus.

|
---

| | |
---
| HUMOR
---

[**John Lithgow Reads From His New Book "Trumpty Dumpty" on The Late Show with Stephen Colbert**](https://secure.kathymanningfornc.com/page/m/18d9d33c/3d199a51/2f4e7715/7364cd7c/2570176656/VEsHBg/?g=Bm8FRTjfd5ld5gouxTH21cA "https://secure.kathymanningfornc.com/page/m/-18d9d3b8/3d181703/2f2a3c1d/7364c6f0/793787327/VEsD/?g=vLlhBFH8x8Vd6KwC5k90gSA")

John Lithgow's new book "Trumpty Dumpty," the follow-up to his bestselling book of poems and illustrations called "Dumpty," might not have been finished in time were it not for these months of quarantine.

|
---

| | |
---
| HOUSE AND HOME
---

[**Have I Been Cleaning All Wrong?**](https://secure.kathymanningfornc.com/page/m/18d9d33c/3d199a51/2f4e7715/7364cd7d/2570176656/VEsHAQ/?g=Bm8FRTjfd5ld5gouxTH21cA "https://www.nytimes.com/2020/05/06/well/live/coronavirus-cleaning-cleaners-disinfectants-home.html?referringSource=articleShare")

Many household disinfectants promise to kill 99.9 percent of germs, but some of us might be cleaning too swiftly to let them do their job.

|
---

| | |
---
| RELATIONSHIPS
---

[**The Man Who Coaches Husbands on How to Avoid Divorce**](https://secure.kathymanningfornc.com/page/m/18d9d33c/3d199a51/2f4e7715/7364cd7a/2570176656/VEsHAA/?g=Bm8FRTjfd5ld5gouxTH21cA "https://www.nytimes.com/2020/05/18/parenting/marriage-invisible-labor-coach.html")

Sheltering in place can put a strain on your relationships. Matthew Fray wrote a blog post in 2016 about how he didn't pick up after himself during his marriage, which contributed to his divorce. Now he coaches spouses about not making that same mistake.

|
---

| | |
---
| SAVE THE DATE
---

**[Be sure to join Kathy and Denise Turner Roth, former Administrator of General Services in the United States for a conversation on recovering after COVID-19. ](https://secure.kathymanningfornc.com/page/m/18d9d33c/3d199a51/2f4e7715/7364cd7b/2570176656/VEsHAw/?g=Bm8FRTjfd5ld5gouxTH21cA "https://secure.kathymanningfornc.com/page/s/ev200610")**

|
---

| | |
---
| STAYING SAFE
---

The CDC recommends wearing cloth face coverings in public settings where other social distancing measures are difficult to maintain (e.g., grocery stores and pharmacies), especially in areas of significant community-based transmission. The CDC also advises the use of simple cloth face coverings to slow the spread of the virus and help people who may have the virus and do not know it from transmitting it to others. Below you will find a list of local mask makers. Protect yourself and your family while shopping local!
**[https://etsy.me/2WP3zxT](https://secure.kathymanningfornc.com/page/m/18d9d33c/3d199a51/2f4e7715/7364cd78/2570176656/VEsHAg/?g=Bm8FRTjfd5ld5gouxTH21cA "https://etsy.me/2WP3zxT")**

|

| | |
---
| MEMORIAL DAY
---

**Memorial Day is an annual day meant to honor and remember military personnel who died in service to their country. Celebrations for the holiday won 't look like they have in prior years, due to the ongoing coronavirus pandemic.**

[**One way to pay tribute to those who made the ultimate sacrifice, is by making a donation to The Carolina Field of Honor.**](https://secure.kathymanningfornc.com/page/m/18d9d33c/3d199a51/2f4e7715/7364cd74/2570176656/VEsEBA/?g=Bm8FRTjfd5ld5gouxTH21cA "https://www.carolinafieldofhonor.org/")

name: =?utf-8?Q?Kathaleen=20Wall?=
subject: Kulkarni thinks your right to bear arms is extreme
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Kathaleen Wall for Congress
body:
‘Diplomat’ Kulkarni received an endorsement from a gun-grabbing PAC | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/d2ae91570f78/release-kathaleen-wall-responds-to-the-house-vote-to-impeach-president-trump-12458545?e=01c99b7fbd)
---
| |
---
| **FOR IMMEDIATE RELEASE:** Thursday, May 21, 2020
---
| | **Conservative Kathaleen Wall Slams Radical Liberal Sri Kulkarni For Accepting Endorsement From Gun-Grabbing Brady PAC **

_“Self-Proclaimed ‘Diplomat’ Sri Kulkarni Thinks Supporting The Second Amendment Is ‘Extremist.’ Somebody Should Give Him A Copy Of The Constitution.”_

**(Sugar Land, TX)** – Sugar Land Republican Congressional Candidate (TX-22) Kathaleen Wall today slammed liberal Democrat Sri Kulkarni for accepting the endorsement of the radical, gun-grabbing Brady PAC, reminding the liberal Democrat he's running for office in Texas, not the United Nations.

“Self-proclaimed ‘diplomat’ Sri Kulkarni thinks supporting the Second Amendment is ‘extremist.’ Somebody should give him a copy of the Constitution,” said Wall. “With his desire to take away legal firearms and keep abortion clinics open while keeping hair salons closed, it’s clear Kulkarni just doesn’t understand Texas or our way of life.”

In recent days Kulkarni has boasted about accepting endorsements from Constitution-hating extremists like Brady PAC, Moms Demand Action! and even Gabby Giffords, while also criticizing Wall for being “the most pro-gun candidate” in the race - a charge the Constitutionalist Wall proudly accepts.

“Unlike Sri Kulkarni, I support the Constitution and our inalienable, God-given right to bear arms, which includes open carry,” Wall continued. “And the fact Kulkarni is proudly accepting the endorsement of every gun-grabbing radical out there shows he’d be Nancy Pelosi’s little puppet if he ever made it to Washington. That’s the last thing Texans want.”

Kathaleen Wall has been a vocal supporter of the Constitution and a fierce opponent of liberal policies such as taking away our gun rights and allowing sanctuary cities. Wall is proud to have the conservative endorsements of U.S. Senator Rand Paul, Congressman Randy Weber, Texas Attorney General Ken Paxton, Texas Agriculture Commissioner Sid Miller, Texas Railroad Commissioner Wayne Christian, the National Association for Gun Rights, Texas Right to Life and the Texas Homeschool Coalition.

###

name: Chris Jacobs
subject: Reopening religious services
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JACOBS FOR CONGRESS [Unsubscribe](http://sendy
body:
|
---
Friend, This week I called for Governor Cuomo to include religious services and organizations to be included in the phase one re-opening of our state ([Channel 4, 5/20/20](http://sendy.sentbybeast.com/l/OAst8O6Rl3q4KZFnr763R83g/6FIFpi2dKqlukZi63vZIlQ/eAeUVOyqGxLEIOhgbF8923cA)) Practicing religion freely is foundational and fundamental to our nation, a fact which is reinforced every time we recite the Pledge of Allegiance. Many in our state, and our nation for that matter, have been supported by their faith and relied upon it to guide them through this difficult time. While public safety is critically important and we have many factors to still take into account, we should still have the ability to practice our faith freely as the constitution allows it. It is difficult to make the argument that businesses can open and operate, yet churches must continue to stay closed - the First Amendment guarantees the freedom to practice religion and the rights of religious practitioners to congregate in traditional settings should precede those of people simply venturing out to dine in restaurants or get a haircut. Massachusetts has opened churches and provided a way forward in terms of safe operations. Masks, thorough and frequent cleaning operations, limited occupancy, and no-touch contribution systems have all been implemented to ensure congregation members can participate in a religious service without subjecting themselves to unreasonable risk. I believe we should observe the same precautions and allow religious services to resume as soon as possible. Governor Cuomo has frequently acted without regard for the constitution - however, this affront to First Amendment cannot be tolerated any longer and we must ensure that he cannot make confetti with our Constitution. On June 23rd we can send strong conservative leadership to Congress, and we can send Governor Cuomo a message that his free reign on our rights and freedoms is over. Thank you for your continued support. I hope you and your families are staying safe. Sincerely, Chris Jacobs
[](http://sendy.sentbybeast.com/l/OAst8O6Rl3q4KZFnr763R83g/0QZT38qhachzPIf1zDWJ4g/eAeUVOyqGxLEIOhgbF8923cA) [](http://sendy.sentbybeast.com/l/OAst8O6Rl3q4KZFnr763R83g/6xowr3vQgMB0PRmeH16vcQ/eAeUVOyqGxLEIOhgbF8923cA)
* * *
5501 Camp Road
P.O. Box 893
Hamburg, NY 14075-9998 PAID FOR BY JACOBS FOR CONGRESS [Unsubscribe](http://sendy.sentbybeast.com/unsubscribe/Fc6SuitAsKVu8aWro763aKJJCNQw2PIOEJddCxdm6OxFg/5zyvI2LQ6kHGzjKRiv8neA/eAeUVOyqGxLEIOhgbF8923cA)

name: =?utf-8?Q?The=20White=20House?=
subject: WATCH: President Trump visits Michigan
body:
Growing up in Detroit, HUD Secretary Ben Carson saw firsthand what a special place the “Motor City” is. | | | | [ ](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=adce7e41ab&e=3ee4985eea)
---
| The White House • May 21, 2020
---
| | |
# **🎬** **WATCH: President Trump visits Michigan**
---
| [ ](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=a7834a6923&e=3ee4985eea)
---
| **Growing up in Detroit,** HUD Secretary Ben Carson saw firsthand what a special place the “Motor City” is. “It used to be the most prosperous city in the United States, if not the world. Largely due to their manufacturing capacity,” he says.

**Today, Secretary Carson** returned to his hometown with President Trump, where they took a close look at how the rebirth of American manufacturing is revitalizing the city—and helping all of America defeat the Coronavirus.

**“Now in cooperation** with this President and this Administration, Detroit is engaged in producing personal protective equipment, PPE, as well as things like ventilators at the automobile factories,” Secretary Carson said. “This Administration is doing everything it can to make sure we have PPE for everybody who needs it in this country.”

**At Ford Motor Company’s** Rawsonville plant today, President Trump saw firsthand how one company quickly repurposed its assets to support frontline medical workers.

**🎬** [President Trump: “America is very proud of Ford!” ](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=be78898f0b&e=3ee4985eea "https://twitter.com/WhiteHouse/status/1263576669320871936")

**Ford Motor’s story** resembles that of many great companies across America. In March, Ford and General Electric announced a partnership to meet President Trump’s call to increase our national ventilator stockpile. As a result, the two firms are producing 50,000 of these critical machines in just 100 days.

**Coronavirus isn’t** the first time American manufacturing has stepped up during a time of need. During World War II, our nation’s factory floors became essential suppliers of military equipment. Ford’s Willow Run assembly plant in Michigan, for instance, famously helped lead the charge by producing a B-24 bomber _every hour_.

**Once again** , many American workers will go down as heroes during a global crisis.

**To help mobilize** this historic effort, President Trump recently rolled out a new plan to strengthen our strategic national stockpile. Working with Congress, he secured $16 billion to grow our reserve of critical supplies such as ventilators, masks, respirators, and pharmaceuticals—ensuring America is fully prepared to meet any future challenge.

**While in Michigan** , President Trump also participated in a listening session with African-American leaders. Earlier this week, he hosted a meeting of his [White House Opportunity and Revitalization Council](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=d0eb0c9276&e=3ee4985eea), discussing how the Administration can continue to support distressed, underserved communities during the pandemic.

**“Before the virus** , African-American unemployment reached its lowest level in history, and African-American poverty reached its lowest level in history,” President Trump said today. Soon, our country will be rebuilding stronger than ever before.

**“You’re going to see** some incredible numbers,” the President said.

[Our Transition to Greatness will lift up the African-American community once again](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=e36a821536&e=3ee4985eea)

**🎬****Press Sec** : [Better trade deals brought back American jobs and manufacturing!](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=b1ade1e69d&e=3ee4985eea)
